title: Get available CellTypist models — CellTypistModels
text: Unified CellTypist model management interface. Use list available models, download models, inspect model metadata, extract model markers, subset models, convert models, delete local models.

title: Get available CellTypist models — CellTypistModels
code: CellTypistModels(   action = c("list", "download", "info", "markers", "subset", "convert", "delete"),   on_the_fly = FALSE,   model = NULL,   force_update = FALSE,   cell_type = NULL,   top_n = 10,   only_positive = TRUE,   keep_cell_types = NULL,   exclude_cell_types = NULL,   output_model_path = NULL,   map_file = NULL,   sep = ",",   convert_from = NULL,   convert_to = NULL,   unique_only = TRUE,   collapse = c("average", "random"),   random_state = 0,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Get available CellTypist models — CellTypistModels
text: action Action perform. One "list", "download", "info", "markers", "subset", "convert", "delete". on_the_fly TRUE, show downloaded models. FALSE, show available models (fetch list server). Used action = "list". Default FALSE. model Model name(s) used actions "list". force_update Whether refresh model index downloading. Used action = "download". cell_type Cell type used action = "markers". top_n Number markers extract action = "markers". only_positive Whether return positive markers. keep_cell_types Cell types retained action = "subset". exclude_cell_types Cell types removed action = "subset". output_model_path Optional output path used "subset" "convert". NULL, original model file overwritten. map_file Optional two-column gene mapping file used action = "convert". sep Delimiter used map_file. convert_from, convert_to Column indices used map_file. unique_only Whether use one--one mappings action = "convert". collapse collapse one--many mappings action = "convert". random_state Random seed used collapse = "random". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Get available CellTypist models — CellTypistModels
text: Depends action: data frame, summary list, character vector.

title: Get available CellTypist models — CellTypistModels
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Get available models models <- CellTypistModels() print(models)  # Show downloaded models only local_models <- CellTypistModels(on_the_fly = TRUE)  # Download a model CellTypistModels(   action = "download",   model = "Immune_All_Low.pkl" )  # Inspect a model CellTypistModels(   action = "info",   model = "Immune_All_Low.pkl" )  # Extract top markers for a cell type CellTypistModels(   action = "markers",   model = "Immune_All_Low.pkl",   cell_type = "B cells",   top_n = 20 ) } # }

what: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
title: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
text: function checks preprocesses list Seurat objects. performs various checks input, including verification input types, assay type consistency, feature name consistency, batch column consistency. also performs data normalization variable feature finding based specified parameters. Finally, prepares data integration analysis based highly variable features.

title: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
code: CheckDataList(   srt_list,   batch,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
text: srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. batch character string specifying batch variable name. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Check and preprocess a list of Seurat objects — CheckDataList
text: list containing preprocessed Seurat objects, highly variable features, assay name, type assay.

what: Check and preprocess a merged seurat object — CheckDataMerge

title: Check and preprocess a merged seurat object — CheckDataMerge
code: CheckDataMerge(   srt_merge,   batch = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Check and preprocess a merged seurat object — CheckDataMerge
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

what: Check and report the type of data in Seurat object — CheckDataType
title: Check and report the type of data in Seurat object — CheckDataType
text: function checks returns string indicating type data. checks presence infinite values, negative values, whether values floats integers.

title: Check and report the type of data in Seurat object — CheckDataType
code: CheckDataType(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' CheckDataType(object, layer = "data", assay = NULL, verbose = TRUE, ...)  # Default S3 method CheckDataType(object, verbose = TRUE, ...)

title: Check and report the type of data in Seurat object — CheckDataType
text: object Seurat object matrix. ... message print. layer layer use. Default data. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: The ComBat integration function — ComBat_integrate
text: ComBat integration function

title: The ComBat integration function — ComBat_integrate
code: ComBat_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   do_scaling = TRUE,   vars_to_regress = NULL,   regression_model = "linear",   scale_within_batch = FALSE,   linear_reduction = "pca",   linear_reduction_dims = 50,   linear_reduction_dims_use = NULL,   linear_reduction_params = list(),   force_linear_reduction = FALSE,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   ComBat_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: The ComBat integration function — ComBat_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. do_scaling Whether perform scaling. TRUE, function force scale data using Seurat::ScaleData function. vars_to_regress vector variable names include additional regression variables. Default NULL. regression_model regression model use scaling. Options "linear", "poisson", "negativebinomial". Default "linear". scale_within_batch Whether scale data within batch. valid integration_method one "Uncorrected", "Seurat", "MNN", "Harmony", "BBKNN", "CSS", "ComBat". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep linear dimensionality reduction. Default 50. linear_reduction_dims_use dimensions use downstream analysis. NULL, estimated dimensions stored linear reduction used available; otherwise, first 50 dimensions used fallback. linear_reduction_params list parameters pass linear dimensionality reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. ComBat_params list parameters sva::ComBat function. Default `list()`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

what: Convert homologous gene symbols in expression objects — ConvertHomologs
title: Convert homologous gene symbols in expression objects — ConvertHomologs
text: Convert feature names species GeneConvert collapse duplicated target homologs summing expression values. Seurat method rebuilds selected assay converted counts matrix keeps cell metadata spatial images present.

title: Convert homologous gene symbols in expression objects — ConvertHomologs
code: ConvertHomologs(   object,   species_from,   species_to,   geneID_from_IDtype = "symbol",   geneID_to_IDtype = "symbol",   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   multi_mapping = c("first"),   keep_unmapped = FALSE,   collapse_fun = c("sum"),   Ensembl_version = NULL,   biomart = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   max_tries = 5,   verbose = TRUE )  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' ConvertHomologs(   object,   species_from,   species_to,   geneID_from_IDtype = "symbol",   geneID_to_IDtype = "symbol",   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   multi_mapping = c("first"),   keep_unmapped = FALSE,   collapse_fun = c("sum"),   Ensembl_version = NULL,   biomart = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   max_tries = 5,   verbose = TRUE )  # S3 method for class 'matrix' ConvertHomologs(   object,   species_from,   species_to,   geneID_from_IDtype = "symbol",   geneID_to_IDtype = "symbol",   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   multi_mapping = c("first"),   keep_unmapped = FALSE,   collapse_fun = c("sum"),   Ensembl_version = NULL,   biomart = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   max_tries = 5,   verbose = TRUE )  # S3 method for class 'Matrix' ConvertHomologs(   object,   species_from,   species_to,   geneID_from_IDtype = "symbol",   geneID_to_IDtype = "symbol",   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   multi_mapping = c("first"),   keep_unmapped = FALSE,   collapse_fun = c("sum"),   Ensembl_version = NULL,   biomart = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   max_tries = 5,   verbose = TRUE )  # Default S3 method ConvertHomologs(   object,   species_from,   species_to,   geneID_from_IDtype = "symbol",   geneID_to_IDtype = "symbol",   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   multi_mapping = c("first"),   keep_unmapped = FALSE,   collapse_fun = c("sum"),   Ensembl_version = NULL,   biomart = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   max_tries = 5,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Convert homologous gene symbols in expression objects — ConvertHomologs
text: object Seurat object gene--cell matrix. species_from Latin names animals input geneID. e.g. "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus". species_to Latin names animals output geneID. e.g. "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus". geneID_from_IDtype Gene ID type input geneID. e.g. "symbol", "ensembl_id", "entrez_id" geneID_to_IDtype Gene ID type(s) convert . e.g. "symbol", "ensembl_id", "entrez_id". assay Assay convert object Seurat object. NULL, default assay used. layer Assay layer used conversion. Default "counts". multi_mapping handle source genes mapped multiple target homologs. "first" keeps first target homolog source gene. keep_unmapped Whether keep unmapped source genes original names. collapse_fun Function used collapse duplicated target homologs. Currently "sum" supported. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. biomart name BioMart database want connect . Possible options include "ensembl", "protists_mart", "fungi_mart", "plants_mart". mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". max_tries maximum number attempts connect BioMart service. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Convert homologous gene symbols in expression objects — ConvertHomologs
text: converted object high-level type object. mapping table stored @tools$ConvertHomologs Seurat objects "ConvertHomologs" attribute matrix inputs.

title: Convert homologous gene symbols in expression objects — ConvertHomologs

title: The Coralysis integration function — Coralysis_integrate
code: Coralysis_integrate(   srt_merge = NULL,   batch = NULL,   append = TRUE,   srt_list = NULL,   assay = NULL,   do_normalization = NULL,   normalization_method = "LogNormalize",   do_HVF_finding = TRUE,   HVF_source = "separate",   HVF_method = "vst",   nHVF = 2000,   HVF_min_intersection = 1,   HVF = NULL,   coralysis_dims_use = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = "umap",   nonlinear_reduction_dims = c(2, 3),   nonlinear_reduction_params = list(),   force_nonlinear_reduction = TRUE,   neighbor_metric = "euclidean",   neighbor_k = 20L,   cluster_algorithm = "louvain",   cluster_resolution = 0.6,   cores = NULL,   PrepareData_params = list(),   RunParallelDivisiveICP_params = list(),   RunPCA_params = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: The Coralysis integration function — Coralysis_integrate
text: srt_merge merged `Seurat` object includes batch information. batch character string specifying batch variable name. append Whether integrated data appended original Seurat object (srt_merge). Default TRUE. srt_list list Seurat objects checked preprocessed. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. do_normalization Whether data normalization performed. Default TRUE. normalization_method normalization method used. Possible values "LogNormalize", "SCT", "TFIDF", "scran". Default "LogNormalize". do_HVF_finding Whether perform high variable feature finding. TRUE, function force find highly variable features (HVF) using specified HVF method. HVF_source source highly variable features. Possible values "global" "separate". Default "separate". HVF_method method use finding highly variable features. Options "vst", "mvp", "disp", "scran". Default "vst". nHVF number highly variable features select. NULL, highly variable features used. Default 2000. HVF_min_intersection feature needs present batches minimum number times order considered highly variable. Default 1. HVF vector feature names use highly variable features. NULL, function use highly variable features identified HVF method. coralysis_dims_use vector specifying dimensions returned Coralysis PCA utilized downstream cell cluster finding nonlinear reduction. `NULL`, available Coralysis PCA dimensions used default. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims number dimensions keep nonlinear dimensionality reduction. vector provided, different numbers dimensions can specified method. Default c(2, 3). nonlinear_reduction_params list parameters pass nonlinear dimensionality reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimensionality reduction even specified reduction already present Seurat object. Default TRUE. neighbor_metric distance metric use finding neighbors. Options "euclidean", "cosine", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "euclidean". neighbor_k number nearest neighbors use finding neighbors. Default 20. cluster_algorithm clustering algorithm use. Options "louvain", "slm", "leiden". Default "louvain". cluster_resolution resolution parameter use clustering. Larger values result fewer clusters. Default 0.6. cores Number threads passed [Coralysis::RunParallelDivisiveICP]. PrepareData_params list parameters [Coralysis::PrepareData]. Default `list()`. RunParallelDivisiveICP_params list parameters [Coralysis::RunParallelDivisiveICP]. Default `list()`. RunPCA_params list parameters [Coralysis::RunPCA]. Default `list()`. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Coverage track plot for ATAC data — CoverageTrackPlot
code: CoverageTrackPlot(   srt,   region,   assay = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   extend.upstream = 1000,   extend.downstream = 1000,   annotation = TRUE,   peaks = TRUE,   links = FALSE,   tile = FALSE,   ranges = NULL,   ranges.group.by = NULL,   region.highlight = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Coverage track plot for ATAC data — CoverageTrackPlot
text: srt Seurat object. region Genomic region passed Signac::CoveragePlot. assay ATAC assay used plotting. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. extend.upstream, extend.downstream Distance extend around region. annotation, peaks, links Whether show gene annotation, peaks links. tile Whether show fragment tiles coverage plot. ranges Optional genomic ranges added external tracks. ranges.group.Optional grouping variable used ranges. region.highlight Optional genomic ranges highlighted locus panel. verbose Whether print progress messages. ... Additional parameters passed Signac::CoveragePlot.

title: Coverage track plot for ATAC data — CoverageTrackPlot
text: coverage plot object.

title: Coverage track plot for ATAC data — CoverageTrackPlot
code: data("pbmcmultiome_sub", package = "scop") # Coverage plotting requires an ATAC object with valid fragment information. if (length(Signac::Fragments(pbmcmultiome_sub[["peaks"]])) > 0) {   CoverageTrackPlot(     pbmcmultiome_sub,     region = rownames(pbmcmultiome_sub[["peaks"]])[1],     assay = "peaks",     group.by = "CellType"   ) }

title: Plot CytoTRACE 2 Results — CytoTRACEPlot
code: CytoTRACEPlot(   srt,   reduction = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   pt.size = NULL,   pt.alpha = 1,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Plot CytoTRACE 2 Results — CytoTRACEPlot
text: srt Seurat object. reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. pt.size size points plot. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed CellDimPlot FeatureDimPlot.

title: Plot CytoTRACE 2 Results — CytoTRACEPlot
text: combine = TRUE, returns patchwork object combining plots. combine = FALSE, returns named list ggplot objects: Score: UMAP plot colored score computed CytoTRACE2; Potency: UMAP plot colored potency category computed CytoTRACE2; Relative: UMAP plot colored relative score computed CytoTRACE2; Phenotype: UMAP plot colored phenotype (group.provided); Boxplot: Boxplot score computed CytoTRACE2 corresponding phenotype (group.provided).

title: DEtest Manhattan Plot — DEtestManhattanPlot
text: srt object class Seurat containing results differential expression analysis. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character string specifying type statistical test use. Default "wilcox". res data.frame data.table differential expression results. res provided, srt ignored. data.frame must contain columns: gene, group1 (factor character), avg_log2FC, p_val_adj, optionally pct.1 pct.2 calculating diff_pct. group_use Groups plot. Default NULL (groups). DE_threshold character string specifying threshold differential expression (used highlight significant genes plot types). Default "p_val < 0.05" sample-level methods ("edgeR" "limma") "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05" otherwise. group_palette Palette cell types (groups) Manhattan plot. Default "Chinese". group_palcolor Custom colors cell types (groups) Manhattan plot. Default NULL. pt.size size points. Default 1. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. cols.highlight character string specifying color highlighted points. Default "black". sizes.highlight size highlighted points. Default 1. alpha.highlight transparency highlighted points. Default 1. stroke.highlight stroke width highlighted points. Default 0.5. nlabel integer value specifying number labeled points per group. Default 5. features_label character vector specifying feature labels plot. Default NULL. label.fg character string specifying color labels' foreground. Default "black". label.bg character string specifying color labels' background. Default "white". label.bg.r radius rounding labels' background. Default 0.1. label.size size labels. Default 4. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "RdBu". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. theme_use Theme use plot. Default "theme_scop". theme_args list additional arguments pass theme function. Default list(). manhattan.bg Background color Manhattan plot. Default "white". jitter_width Horizontal jitter range points Manhattan plot. Default 0.5. jitter_height Vertical jitter range points Manhattan plot. Default 0.4. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default NULL. xlab character string specifying x-axis label. ylab character string specifying y-axis label.

title: Differential Expression Test Plot — DEtestPlot
code: DEtestPlot(   srt,   group.by = NULL,   test.use = "wilcox",   res = NULL,   plot_type = c("volcano", "manhattan", "ring"),   group_use = NULL,   DE_threshold = "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05",   x_metric = NULL,   y_metric = c("p_val_adj", "p_val"),   x_order = c("gene", "index"),   palette = "RdBu",   palcolor = NULL,   group_palette = "Chinese",   group_palcolor = NULL,   pt.size = 1,   pt.alpha = 1,   cols.background = "grey80",   cols.highlight = "black",   sizes.highlight = 1,   alpha.highlight = 1,   stroke.highlight = 0.5,   nlabel = 5,   features_label = NULL,   label.fg = "black",   label.bg = "white",   label.bg.r = 0.1,   label.size = 4,   aspect.ratio = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   manhattan.bg = "white",   jitter_width = 0.5,   jitter_height = 0.4,   tile_height = 0.3,   tile_gap = 0.1,   ring_segments = TRUE,   seed = 11,   threshold_method = c("rectangular", "hyperbolic"),   hyperbola_c = 6,   annotate_enrichment = FALSE,   enrich_from = c("Enrichment", "GSEA", "GSVA"),   enrich_db = NULL,   enrich_terms = NULL,   enrich_top_terms = 3,   enrich_padj_cutoff = 0.05,   enrich_gsva_score_cutoff = NULL,   gsva_method = NULL,   enrich_nlabel = 15 )

title: Differential Expression Test Plot — DEtestPlot
text: srt object class Seurat containing results differential expression analysis. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character string specifying type statistical test use. Default "wilcox". res data.frame data.table differential expression results. res provided, srt ignored. data.frame must contain columns: gene, group1 (factor character), avg_log2FC, p_val_adj, optionally pct.1 pct.2 calculating diff_pct. plot_type Type plot create. Options: "volcano", "manhattan", "ring". Default "volcano". group_use Groups plot. Default NULL (groups). DE_threshold character string specifying threshold differential expression (used highlight significant genes plot types). Default "p_val < 0.05" sample-level methods ("edgeR" "limma") "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05" otherwise. x_metric character string specifying metric use x-axis (volcano plot). Default NULL, uses "avg_log2FC" sample-level methods ("edgeR" "limma") "diff_pct" otherwise. y_metric character string specifying metric use y-axis. Options: "p_val" "p_val_adj". Default "p_val" sample-level methods ("edgeR" "limma") "p_val_adj" otherwise. x_order character string specifying order genes x-axis (Manhattan plot, used currently). Options: "gene" (alphabetical gene name) "index" (data order). Default "gene". palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "RdBu". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. group_palette Palette cell types (groups) Manhattan plot. Default "Chinese". group_palcolor Custom colors cell types (groups) Manhattan plot. Default NULL. pt.size size points. Default 1. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. cols.background character string specifying color non-DE background points volcano plots. Default "grey80". cols.highlight character string specifying color highlighted points. Default "black". sizes.highlight size highlighted points. Default 1. alpha.highlight transparency highlighted points. Default 1. stroke.highlight stroke width highlighted points. Default 0.5. nlabel integer value specifying number labeled points per group. Default 5. features_label character vector specifying feature labels plot. Default NULL. label.fg character string specifying color labels' foreground. Default "black". label.bg character string specifying color labels' background. Default "white". label.bg.r radius rounding labels' background. Default 0.1. label.size size labels. Default 4. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default NULL. xlab character string specifying x-axis label. ylab character string specifying y-axis label. theme_use Theme use plot. Default "theme_scop". theme_args list additional arguments pass theme function. Default list(). combine Whether combine multiple plots one. Default TRUE. nrow Number rows combined plots. Default NULL. ncol Number columns combined plots. Default NULL. byrow Whether fill plots row. Default TRUE. manhattan.bg Background color Manhattan plot. Default "white". jitter_width Horizontal jitter range points Manhattan plot. Default 0.5. jitter_height Vertical jitter range points Manhattan plot. Default 0.4. tile_height Height cell-type track ring plot. Default 0.3. tile_gap Gap track nudged points ring plot. Default 0.1. ring_segments Whether draw segment lines cell types ring plot. Default TRUE. seed Random seed jitter ring plot. Default 11. threshold_method Volcano significance threshold method. Options "rectangular" (legacy DE_threshold) "hyperbolic" (|log2FC * -log10(padj)| > c). Default "rectangular". hyperbola_c Numeric cutoff c hyperbolic volcano threshold. Default 6. annotate_enrichment Whether annotate enrichment-hit genes volcano plots. Enrichment results read existing results srt@tools . Default FALSE. enrich_from Character vector specifying enrichment result source(s) annotate. Options "Enrichment", "GSEA", "GSVA". Default c("Enrichment", "GSEA", "GSVA"). enrich_db Optional database filter enrichment annotation, e.g. "GO_BP" "KEGG". Default NULL. enrich_terms Optional whitelist enrichment term IDs names annotation. Default NULL. enrich_top_terms Number top enriched terms selected per source/group/database. Default 3. enrich_padj_cutoff Adjusted p-value cutoff "Enrichment" "GSEA" annotation. Default 0.05. enrich_gsva_score_cutoff Optional absolute GSVA score cutoff "GSVA" annotation. Default NULL. gsva_method Optional GSVA method filter (e.g. "gsva" "ssgsea") multiple GSVA tool slots exist. Default NULL. enrich_nlabel Maximum number enrichment-derived labels added per group. Labels features_label always retained. Default 15.

title: DEtest Ring Plot — DEtestRingPlot
text: srt object class Seurat containing results differential expression analysis. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character string specifying type statistical test use. Default "wilcox". res data.frame data.table differential expression results. res provided, srt ignored. data.frame must contain columns: gene, group1 (factor character), avg_log2FC, p_val_adj, optionally pct.1 pct.2 calculating diff_pct. group_use Groups plot. Default NULL (groups). DE_threshold character string specifying threshold differential expression (used highlight significant genes plot types). Default "p_val < 0.05" sample-level methods ("edgeR" "limma") "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05" otherwise. group_palette Palette cell types (groups) Manhattan plot. Default "Chinese". group_palcolor Custom colors cell types (groups) Manhattan plot. Default NULL. pt.size size points. Default 1. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. cols.highlight character string specifying color highlighted points. Default "black". sizes.highlight size highlighted points. Default 1. alpha.highlight transparency highlighted points. Default 1. stroke.highlight stroke width highlighted points. Default 0.5. nlabel integer value specifying number labeled points per group. Default 5. features_label character vector specifying feature labels plot. Default NULL. label.fg character string specifying color labels' foreground. Default "black". label.bg character string specifying color labels' background. Default "white". label.bg.r radius rounding labels' background. Default 0.1. label.size size labels. Default 4. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "RdBu". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. theme_use Theme use plot. Default "theme_scop". theme_args list additional arguments pass theme function. Default list(). tile_height Height cell-type track ring plot. Default 0.3. tile_gap Gap track nudged points ring plot. Default 0.1. jitter_width Horizontal jitter range points Manhattan plot. Default 0.5. ring_segments Whether draw segment lines cell types ring plot. Default TRUE. seed Random seed jitter ring plot. Default 11.

title: Heatmap plot for dynamic features along lineages — DynamicHeatmap
text: srt Seurat object. lineages character vector specifying lineage names dynamic features calculated. features character vector specifying features plot. default, parameter set NULL, dynamic features determined parameters min_expcells, r.sq, dev.expl, padjust num_intersections. use_fitted Whether use fitted values. Default FALSE. border Whether add border heatmap. Default TRUE. flip Whether flip heatmap. Default FALSE. min_expcells minimum number expected cells. Default 20. r.sq R-squared threshold. Default 0.2. dev.expl deviance explained threshold. Default 0.2. padjust p-value adjustment threshold. Default 0.05. num_intersections parameter numeric vector used determine number intersections among lineages. helps selecting dynamic features used. default, parameter set NULL, dynamic features pass specified threshold used lineage. cell_density cell density within cell bin. default, parameter set 1, means cells included within cell bin. cell_bins number cell bins. Default 100. order_by order heatmap. Default "peaktime". layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. exp_method character vector specifying method calculating expression values. Options "zscore", "raw", "fc", "log2fc", "log1p". Default "zscore". exp_legend_title character vector specifying title legend expression value. Default NULL. limits two-length numeric vector specifying limits color scale. Default NULL. lib_normalize Whether normalize data library size. libsize numeric vector specifying library size cell. Default NULL. family character character vector specifying family distributions use GAM. family set NULL, appropriate family automatically determined based data. length(family) 1, family used features. Otherwise, family must length features. suffix character vector specifying suffix append output layer names lineage. Default lineage names. n_candidates number candidate features select features NULL. Default 1000. minfreq integer specifying minimum frequency threshold candidate features. Features frequency less minfreq excluded. Default 5. fit_method method used fitting features. Either "gam" (generalized additive models) "pretsa" (Pattern recognition Temporal Spatial Analyses). Default "gam". knot fit_method = "pretsa": B-spline knots. 0 "auto". Default 0. max_knot_allowed fit_method = "pretsa" knot = "auto": max knots. Default 10. padjust_method method used p-value adjustment. Default "fdr". cluster_features_by lineage use clustering features. default, parameter set NULL, means lineages used. cluster_rows Whether cluster rows heatmap. Default FALSE. cluster_row_slices Whether cluster row slices heatmap. Default FALSE. cluster_columns Whether cluster columns heatmap. Default FALSE. cluster_column_slices Whether cluster column slices heatmap. Default FALSE. show_row_names Whether show row names heatmap. Default FALSE. show_column_names Whether show column names heatmap. Default FALSE. row_names_side character vector specifying side place row names. column_names_side character vector specifying side place column names. row_names_rot rotation angle row names. Default 0. column_names_rot rotation angle column names. Default 90. row_title character vector specifying title rows. Default NULL. column_title character vector specifying title columns. Default NULL. row_title_side character vector specifying side place row title. Default "left". column_title_side character vector specifying side place column title. Default "top". row_title_rot rotation angle row title. Default 0. column_title_rot rotation angle column title. feature_split factor specifying split features. Default NULL. feature_split_by character vector specifying group.use splitting features (n_split feature clusters). Default NULL. n_split number feature splits (feature clusters) create. Default NULL. split_order numeric vector specifying order splits. Default NULL. split_method character vector specifying method splitting features. Options "kmeans", "hclust", "mfuzz". Default "kmeans". decreasing Whether sort feature splits decreasing order. Default FALSE. fuzzification fuzzification coefficient. Default NULL. anno_terms Whether include term annotations. Default FALSE. anno_keys Whether include key annotations. Default FALSE. anno_features Whether include feature annotations. Default FALSE. terms_width unit specifying width term annotations. Default unit(4, ""). terms_fontsize numeric vector specifying font size(s) term annotations. Default 8. keys_width unit specifying width key annotations. Default unit(2, ""). keys_fontsize two-length numeric vector specifying minimum maximum font size(s) key annotations. Default c(6, 10). features_width unit specifying width feature annotations. Default unit(2, ""). features_fontsize two-length numeric vector specifying minimum maximum font size(s) feature annotations. Default c(6, 10). IDtype character vector specifying type IDs features. Default "symbol". species character vector specifying species features. Default "Homo_sapiens". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether use combined database. Default FALSE. convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror character vector specifying mirror Ensembl database. Default NULL. db character vector specifying database use. Default "GO_BP". TERM2GENE data.frame specifying TERM2GENE mapping database. Default NULL. TERM2NAME data.frame specifying TERM2NAME mapping database. Default NULL. minGSSize integer specifying minimum gene set size database. Default 10. maxGSSize integer specifying maximum gene set size database. Default 500. GO_simplify Whether simplify gene ontology terms. Default FALSE. GO_simplify_cutoff character vector specifying cutoff GO simplification. Default "p.adjust < 0.05". simplify_method character vector specifying method GO simplification. Default "Wang". simplify_similarityCutoff similarity cutoff GO simplification. Default 0.7. pvalueCutoff numeric vector specifying p-value cutoff(s) significance. Default NULL. padjustCutoff adjusted p-value cutoff significance. Default 0.05. topTerm number top terms include. Default 5. show_termid Whether show term IDs. Default FALSE. topWord number top words include. Default 20. words_excluded character vector specifying words exclude. Default NULL. nlabel number labels include. Default 20. features_label character vector specifying features label. Default NULL. label_size size labels. Default 10. label_color character vector specifying color labels. Default "black". pseudotime_label pseudotime label. Default NULL. pseudotime_label_color pseudotime label color. Default "black". pseudotime_label_linetype pseudotime label line type. Default 2. pseudotime_label_linewidth pseudotime label line width. Default 3. heatmap_palette character vector specifying palette use heatmap. Default "RdBu". heatmap_palcolor character vector specifying heatmap color use. Default NULL. pseudotime_palette color palette use pseudotime. Default "cividis". pseudotime_palcolor colors use pseudotime heatmap. Default NULL. feature_split_palette character vector specifying palette use feature splits. Default "simspec". feature_split_palcolor character vector specifying feature split color use. Default NULL. cell_annotation character vector specifying cell annotation(s) include. Default NULL. cell_annotation_palette character vector specifying palette use cell annotations. length vector match number cell_annotation. Default "Chinese". cell_annotation_palcolor list character vector specifying cell annotation color(s) use. length list match number cell_annotation. Default NULL. cell_annotation_params list specifying additional parameters cell annotations. Default list width = unit(1, "cm") flip TRUE, else list height = unit(1, "cm"). feature_annotation character vector specifying feature annotation(s) include. Default NULL. feature_annotation_palette character vector specifying palette use feature annotations. length vector match number feature_annotation. Default "Dark2". feature_annotation_palcolor list character vector specifying feature annotation color use. length list match number feature_annotation. Default NULL. feature_annotation_params list specifying additional parameters feature annotations. Default list(). separate_annotation Names annotations displayed separate annotation blocks. name match column name metadata Seurat object. separate_annotation_palette color palette use separate annotations. Default "Chinese". separate_annotation_palcolor colors use level separate annotations. Default NULL. separate_annotation_params parameters ComplexHeatmap::HeatmapAnnotation creating separate annotation blocks. reverse_ht Whether reverse heatmap. Default NULL. use_raster Whether use raster device plotting. Default NULL. raster_device character vector specifying raster device use. Default "png". raster_by_magick Whether use 'magick' package raster. Default FALSE. height height heatmap specified units. provided, height automatically determined based number rows heatmap default unit. width width heatmap specified units. provided, width automatically determined based number columns heatmap default unit. units units use width height heatmap. Default "inch", Options "mm", "cm", "inch". cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. ht_params Additional parameters customize appearance heatmap. list named elements, names correspond parameter names ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap function. conflicting parameters override defaults set function. Default list().

title: Plot dynamic features across pseudotime — DynamicPlot
text: Plot dynamic features across pseudotime

title: Plot dynamic features across pseudotime — DynamicPlot
code: DynamicPlot(   srt,   lineages,   features,   group.by = NULL,   cells = NULL,   layer = "counts",   assay = NULL,   family = NULL,   exp_method = c("log1p", "raw", "zscore", "fc", "log2fc"),   lib_normalize = identical(layer, "counts"),   libsize = NULL,   compare_lineages = TRUE,   compare_features = FALSE,   add_line = TRUE,   add_interval = TRUE,   line.size = 1,   line_palette = "Dark2",   line_palcolor = NULL,   add_point = TRUE,   pt.size = 1,   point_palette = "Chinese",   point_palcolor = NULL,   add_rug = TRUE,   flip = FALSE,   reverse = FALSE,   x_order = c("value", "rank"),   aspect.ratio = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Plot dynamic features across pseudotime — DynamicPlot
text: srt Seurat object. lineages character vector specifying lineages plot. features character vector features use. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . cells character vector cell names use. Default NULL. layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. family character specifying model used calculate dynamic features needed. default, parameter set NULL, appropriate family automatically determined. exp_method character specifying method transform expression values. Default "log1p" options "log1p", "raw", "zscore", "fc", "log2fc". lib_normalize boolean specifying whether normalize expression values using library size. Default layer counts, parameter set TRUE. Otherwise, set FALSE. libsize numeric vector specifying library size cell. Default NULL. compare_lineages boolean specifying whether compare lineages plot. Default TRUE. compare_features boolean specifying whether compare features plot. Default FALSE. add_line boolean specifying whether add lines plot. Default TRUE. add_interval boolean specifying whether add confidence intervals plot. Default TRUE. line.size numeric specifying size lines. Default 1. line_palette character string specifying name palette use line colors. Default "Dark2". line_palcolor vector specifying colors use line palette. Default NULL. add_point boolean specifying whether add points plot. Default TRUE. pt.size numeric specifying size points. Default 1. point_palette character string specifying name palette use point colors. Default "Chinese". point_palcolor vector specifying colors use point palette. Default NULL. add_rug boolean specifying whether add rugs plot. Default TRUE. flip boolean specifying whether flip x-axis. Default FALSE. reverse boolean specifying whether reverse x-axis. Default FALSE. x_order character specifying order x-axis values. Default c("value", "rank"). aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Enrichment Plot — EnrichmentPlot
text: function generates various types plots enrichment (-representation) analysis.

title: Enrichment Plot — EnrichmentPlot
code: EnrichmentPlot(   srt,   db = "GO_BP",   group.by = NULL,   test.use = "wilcox",   res = NULL,   plot_type = c("bar", "dot", "lollipop", "network", "enrichmap", "wordcloud",     "comparison"),   split_by = c("Database", "Groups"),   color_by = "Database",   group_use = NULL,   id_use = NULL,   pvalueCutoff = NULL,   padjustCutoff = 0.05,   topTerm = ifelse(plot_type == "enrichmap", 100, 6),   compare_only_sig = FALSE,   topWord = 100,   word_type = c("term", "feature"),   word_size = c(2, 8),   words_excluded = NULL,   network_layout = "fr",   network_labelsize = 5,   network_blendmode = "blend",   network_layoutadjust = TRUE,   network_adjscale = 60,   network_adjiter = 100,   enrichmap_layout = "fr",   enrichmap_cluster = "fast_greedy",   enrichmap_label = c("term", "feature"),   enrichmap_labelsize = 5,   enrlichmap_nlabel = 4,   enrichmap_show_keyword = FALSE,   enrichmap_mark = c("ellipse", "hull"),   enrichmap_expand = c(0.5, 0.5),   character_width = 50,   lineheight = 0.7,   palette = "Spectral",   palcolor = NULL,   aspect.ratio = 1,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Enrichment Plot — EnrichmentPlot
text: srt Seurat object containing results RunDEtest RunEnrichment. specified, enrichment results extracted Seurat object automatically. specified, res arguments must provided. db database use enrichment plot. Default "GO_BP". group.character vector specifying grouping variable Seurat object. argument used srt specified. test.use character vector specifying test used differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. res Enrichment results generated RunEnrichment function. provided, 'srt', 'test.use' 'group.' ignored. plot_type type plot generate. Options : "bar", "dot", "lollipop", "network", "enrichmap", "wordcloud", "comparison". Default "bar". split_by splitting variable(s) plot. Can "Database", "Groups", . Default c("Database", "Groups") plots. color_by variable used coloring. Default "Database". group_use group(s) used enrichment plot. Default NULL. id_use List IDs used display specific terms enrichment plot. Default value NULL. pvalueCutoff p-value cutoff. work padjustCutoff NULL. Default NULL. padjustCutoff p-adjusted cutoff. Default 0.05. topTerm number top terms display. Default 6, 100 plot_type "enrichmap". compare_only_sig Whether compare significant terms. Default FALSE. topWord number top words display wordcloud. Default 100. word_type type words display wordcloud. Options "term" "feature". Default "term". word_size size range words wordcloud. Default c(2, 8). words_excluded Words excluded wordcloud. Default NULL, means built-words (words_excluded) used. network_layout layout algorithm use network plot. Options "fr", "kk", "random", "circle", "tree", "grid", algorithm igraph package. Default "fr". network_labelsize label size network plot. Default 5. network_blendmode blend mode network plot. Default 60. network_adjiter number iterations adjusting network plot layout. Default 100. enrichmap_layout layout algorithm use enrichmap plot. Options "fr", "kk", "random", "circle", "tree", "grid", algorithm igraph package. Default "fr". enrichmap_cluster clustering algorithm use enrichmap plot. Options "walktrap", "fast_greedy", algorithm igraph package. Default "fast_greedy". enrichmap_label label type enrichmap plot. Options "term" "feature". Default "term". enrichmap_labelsize label size enrichmap plot. Default 5. enrlichmap_nlabel number labels display cluster enrichmap plot. Default 4. enrichmap_show_keyword Whether show keyword terms features enrichmap plot. Default FALSE. enrichmap_mark mark shape enrichmap plot. Options "ellipse" "hull". Default "ellipse". enrichmap_expand expansion factor enrichmap plot. Default c(0.5, 0.5). character_width maximum width character descriptions. Default 50. lineheight line height y-axis labels. Default 0.7. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Spectral". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. title: Features correlation plot — FeatureCorPlot
code: FeatureCorPlot(   srt,   features,   group.by = NULL,   split.by = NULL,   cells = NULL,   layer = "data",   assay = NULL,   cor_method = "pearson",   adjust = 1,   margin = 1,   reverse = FALSE,   add_equation = FALSE,   add_r2 = TRUE,   add_pvalue = TRUE,   add_smooth = TRUE,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   cor_palette = "RdBu",   cor_palcolor = NULL,   cor_range = c(-1, 1),   pt.size = NULL,   pt.alpha = 1,   cells.highlight = NULL,   cols.highlight = "black",   sizes.highlight = 1,   alpha.highlight = 1,   stroke.highlight = 0.5,   calculate_coexp = FALSE,   raster = NULL,   raster.dpi = c(512, 512),   aspect.ratio = 1,   title = NULL,   subtitle = NULL,   legend.position = "right",   legend.direction = "vertical",   theme_use = "theme_scop",   theme_args = list(),   combine = TRUE,   nrow = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   byrow = TRUE,   force = FALSE,   seed = 11 )

title: Features correlation plot — FeatureCorPlot
text: srt Seurat object. features character vector specifying features compare. present assay data metadata Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. cells character vector cell names use. layer layer use. Default data. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. cor_method character string specifying correlation method use. Can "pearson" "spearman". Default "pearson". adjust adjustment factor width violin plots. Default 1. margin margin size plot. Default 1. reverse Whether reverse order features plot. Default FALSE. add_equation Whether add equation linear regression line scatter plot. Default FALSE. add_r2 Whether add R-squared value linear regression line scatter plot. Default TRUE. add_pvalue Whether add p-value linear regression line scatter plot. Default TRUE. add_smooth Whether add smoothed line scatter plot. Default TRUE. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. cor_palette character string specifying name color palette use correlation. Default "RdBu". cor_palcolor character string specifying color correlation. Default "RdBu". cor_range two-length numeric vector specifying range correlation. pt.size size points plot. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. cells.highlight logical character vector specifying cells highlight plot. TRUE, cells highlighted. FALSE, cells highlighted. Default NULL. cols.highlight Color used highlight cells. sizes.highlight Size highlighted cell points. alpha.highlight Transparency highlighted cell points. stroke.highlight Border width highlighted cell points. calculate_coexp Whether calculate co-expression selected features. Default FALSE. raster Convert points raster format. Default NULL, automatically rasterizes plotting 100,000 cells. raster.dpi Pixel resolution rasterized plots. Default c(512, 512). aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default NULL. subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. force Whether force creation plot, even contains 50 subplots. Default FALSE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Visualize feature values on a 2-dimensional reduction plot — FeatureDimPlot
text: srt Seurat object. features character vector named list features plot. Features can gene names Assay names numeric columns meta.data. reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. dims Dimensions plot, must two-length numeric vector specifying x- y-dimensions split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. cells character vector cell names use. layer layer use. Default data. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. show_stat Whether show statistical information plot. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. pt.size size points plot. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. bg_cutoff Background cutoff. Points feature values lower cutoff considered background colored bg_color. bg_color Color value background(NA) points. keep_scale handle color scale across multiple plots. Options : NULL (scaling): individual plot scaled maximum expression value feature condition provided 'split.'. aware setting NULL result color scales comparable plots. "feature" (default; row/feature scaling): plots individual feature scaled maximum expression feature across conditions provided 'split.'. "" (universal scaling): plots features conditions scaled maximum expression value feature highest overall expression. lower_quantile, upper_quantile, lower_cutoff, upper_cutoff Vector minimum maximum cutoff values quantile values feature. add_density Whether add density layer plot. density_color Color density contours lines. density_filled Whether add filled contour bands instead contour lines. density_filled_palette Color palette used fill contour bands. density_filled_palcolor Custom colors used fill contour bands. cells.highlight logical character vector specifying cells highlight plot. TRUE, cells highlighted. FALSE, cells highlighted. Default NULL. cols.highlight Color used highlight cells. sizes.highlight Size highlighted cell points. alpha.highlight Transparency highlighted cell points. stroke.highlight Border width highlighted cell points. calculate_coexp Whether calculate co-expression value (geometric mean) features. compare_features Whether show values multiple features single plot. color_blend_mode Blend mode use compare_features = TRUE label Whether feature name labeled center location cells high expression. label.size Size labels. label.fg Foreground color label. label.bg Background color label. label.bg.r Background ratio label. label_insitu Whether labels feature names instead numbers. Valid compare_features = TRUE. label_repel Logical value indicating whether label repel away center points. label_repulsion Force repulsion overlapping text labels. Default 20. label_point_size Size center points. label_point_color Color center points. label_segment_color Color line segment labels. lineages Lineages/pseudotime add plot. specified, curves fitted using stats::loess method. lineages_trim Trim leading trailing data lineages. lineages_span parameter α controls degree smoothing stats::loess method. lineages_palette Color palette used lineages. lineages_palcolor Custom colors used lineages. lineages_arrow Set arrows lineages. See grid::arrow. lineages_linewidth Width fitted curve lines lineages. lineages_line_bg Background color curve lines lineages. lineages_line_bg_stroke Border width curve lines background. lineages_whiskers Whether add whiskers lineages. lineages_whiskers_linewidth Width whiskers lineages. lineages_whiskers_alpha Transparency whiskers lineages. graph Specify graph name add edges cell neighbors plot. edge_size Size edges. edge_alpha Transparency edges. edge_color Color edges. hex Whether chane plot type point hexagonal bin. hex.linewidth Border width hexagonal bins. hex.color Border color hexagonal bins. hex.bins Number hexagonal bins. hex.binwidth Hexagonal bin width. raster Convert points raster format. Default NULL, automatically rasterizes plotting 100,000 cells. raster.dpi Pixel resolution rasterized plots. Default c(512, 512). aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default 1. title text title. Default NULL. subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". legend.title Title legend. Default NULL, uses group name. theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. force Whether force drawing regardless number features greater 100. Default FALSE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Feature Heatmap — FeatureHeatmap
text: srt Seurat object. features character vector features use. Default NULL. cells character vector cell names use. Default NULL. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. within_groups Whether create separate heatmap scales group within group. Default FALSE. max_cells integer, maximum number cells sample per group. Default 100. cell_order vector cell names defining order cells. Default NULL. border Whether add border heatmap. Default TRUE. flip Whether flip heatmap. Default FALSE. layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. exp_method character vector specifying method calculating expression values. Options "zscore", "raw", "fc", "log2fc", "log1p". Default "zscore". exp_legend_title character vector specifying title legend expression value. Default NULL. limits two-length numeric vector specifying limits color scale. Default NULL. lib_normalize Whether normalize data library size. libsize numeric vector specifying library size cell. Default NULL. feature_split factor specifying split features. Default NULL. feature_split_by character vector specifying group.use splitting features (n_split feature clusters). Default NULL. n_split number feature splits (feature clusters) create. Default NULL. split_order numeric vector specifying order splits. Default NULL. split_method character vector specifying method splitting features. Options "kmeans", "hclust", "mfuzz". Default "kmeans". decreasing Whether sort feature splits decreasing order. Default FALSE. fuzzification fuzzification coefficient. Default NULL. cluster_features_by character vector specifying group.use clustering features. Default NULL. default, parameter set NULL, means groups used. cluster_rows Whether cluster rows heatmap. Default FALSE. cluster_columns Whether cluster columns heatmap. Default FALSE. cluster_row_slices Whether cluster row slices heatmap. Default FALSE. cluster_column_slices Whether cluster column slices heatmap. Default FALSE. show_row_names Whether show row names heatmap. Default FALSE. show_column_names Whether show column names heatmap. Default FALSE. row_names_side character vector specifying side place row names. column_names_side character vector specifying side place column names. row_names_rot rotation angle row names. Default 0. column_names_rot rotation angle column names. Default 90. row_title character vector specifying title rows. Default NULL. column_title character vector specifying title columns. Default NULL. row_title_side character vector specifying side place row title. Default "left". column_title_side character vector specifying side place column title. Default "top". row_title_rot rotation angle row title. Default 0. column_title_rot rotation angle column title. anno_terms Whether include term annotations. Default FALSE. anno_keys Whether include key annotations. Default FALSE. anno_features Whether include feature annotations. Default FALSE. terms_width unit specifying width term annotations. Default unit(4, ""). terms_fontsize numeric vector specifying font size(s) term annotations. Default 8. keys_width unit specifying width key annotations. Default unit(2, ""). keys_fontsize two-length numeric vector specifying minimum maximum font size(s) key annotations. Default c(6, 10). features_width unit specifying width feature annotations. Default unit(2, ""). features_fontsize two-length numeric vector specifying minimum maximum font size(s) feature annotations. Default c(6, 10). IDtype character vector specifying type IDs features. Default "symbol". species character vector specifying species features. Default "Homo_sapiens". db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether use combined database. Default FALSE. convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror character vector specifying mirror Ensembl database. Default NULL. db character vector specifying database use. Default "GO_BP". TERM2GENE data.frame specifying TERM2GENE mapping database. Default NULL. TERM2NAME data.frame specifying TERM2NAME mapping database. Default NULL. minGSSize integer specifying minimum gene set size database. Default 10. maxGSSize integer specifying maximum gene set size database. Default 500. GO_simplify Whether simplify gene ontology terms. Default FALSE. GO_simplify_cutoff character vector specifying cutoff GO simplification. Default "p.adjust < 0.05". simplify_method character vector specifying method GO simplification. Default "Wang". simplify_similarityCutoff similarity cutoff GO simplification. Default 0.7. pvalueCutoff numeric vector specifying p-value cutoff(s) significance. Default NULL. padjustCutoff adjusted p-value cutoff significance. Default 0.05. topTerm number top terms include. Default 5. show_termid Whether show term IDs. Default FALSE. topWord number top words include. Default 20. words_excluded character vector specifying words exclude. Default NULL. nlabel number labels include. Default 20. features_label character vector specifying features label. Default NULL. label_size size labels. Default 10. label_color character vector specifying color labels. Default "black". heatmap_palette character vector specifying palette use heatmap. Default "RdBu". heatmap_palcolor character vector specifying heatmap color use. Default NULL. group_palette character vector specifying palette use groups. Default "Chinese". group_palcolor character vector specifying group color use. Default NULL. cell_split_palette character vector specifying palette use cell splits. Default "simspec". cell_split_palcolor character vector specifying cell split color use. Default NULL. feature_split_palette character vector specifying palette use feature splits. Default "simspec". feature_split_palcolor character vector specifying feature split color use. Default NULL. cell_annotation character vector specifying cell annotation(s) include. Default NULL. cell_annotation_palette character vector specifying palette use cell annotations. length vector match number cell_annotation. Default "Chinese". cell_annotation_palcolor list character vector specifying cell annotation color(s) use. length list match number cell_annotation. Default NULL. cell_annotation_params list specifying additional parameters cell annotations. Default list width = unit(1, "cm") flip TRUE, else list height = unit(1, "cm"). feature_annotation character vector specifying feature annotation(s) include. Default NULL. feature_annotation_palette character vector specifying palette use feature annotations. length vector match number feature_annotation. Default "Dark2". feature_annotation_palcolor list character vector specifying feature annotation color use. length list match number feature_annotation. Default NULL. feature_annotation_params list specifying additional parameters feature annotations. Default list(). use_raster Whether use raster device plotting. Default NULL. raster_device character vector specifying raster device use. Default "png". raster_by_magick Whether use 'magick' package raster. Default FALSE. height height heatmap specified units. provided, height automatically determined based number rows heatmap default unit. width width heatmap specified units. provided, width automatically determined based number columns heatmap default unit. units units use width height heatmap. Default "inch", Options "mm", "cm", "inch". cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. ht_params Additional parameters customize appearance heatmap. list named elements, names correspond parameter names ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap function. conflicting parameters override defaults set function. Default list(). verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Statistical plot of features — FeatureStatPlot
text: srt Seurat object. stat.character vector specifying features plot. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. bg.character vector specifying variable use background color. Default NULL. plot.character vector specifying plot data, group feature. Possible values "group" "feature". Default "group". fill.string specifying fill plot . Possible values "group", "feature", "expression". Default "group". cells character vector cell names use. Default NULL. layer layer use. Default data. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. keep_empty Whether keep empty levels plot. Default FALSE. individual Whether create individual plots group. Default FALSE. plot_type string specifying type plot create. Possible values "violin", "box", "bar", "dot", "col". Default "violin". palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. alpha transparency plot. Default 1. bg_palette string specifying color palette use background. Default "Chinese". bg_palcolor character vector specifying specific colors use background. Default NULL. bg_alpha transparency background. Default 0.2. add_box Whether add box plot plot. Default FALSE. box_color string specifying color box plot. Default "black". box_width width box plot. Default 0.1. box_ptsize size points box plot. Default 2. add_point Whether add individual data points plot. Default FALSE. pt.color string specifying color data points. Default "grey30". pt.size size points plot. pt.alpha transparency data points. Default 1. jitter.width width jitter. Default 0.5. jitter.height height jitter. Default 0.1. add_trend Whether add trend line plot. Default FALSE. trend_color string specifying color trend line. Default "black". trend_linewidth width trend line. Default 1. trend_ptsize size points trend line. Default 2. add_stat string specifying statistical summary add plot. Possible values "none", "mean", "median". Default "none". stat_color string specifying color statistical summary. Default "black". stat_size size statistical summary. Default 1. stat_stroke stroke width statistical summary. Default 1. stat_shape shape statistical summary. Default 25. add_line y-intercept adding horizontal line. Default NULL. line_color string specifying color horizontal line. Default "red". line_size width horizontal line. Default 1. line_type type horizontal line. Default 1. cells.highlight logical character vector specifying cells highlight plot. TRUE, cells highlighted. FALSE, cells highlighted. Default NULL. cols.highlight string specifying color highlighted cells. Default "red". sizes.highlight size highlighted cells. Default 1. alpha.highlight transparency highlighted cells. Default 1. calculate_coexp Whether calculate co-expression values. Default FALSE. .y.lims Whether use y-axis limits plots. Default FALSE. y.min numeric character value specifying minimum y-axis limit. character value provided, must form "qN" N number 0 100 (inclusive) representing quantile use limit. Default NULL. y.max numeric character value specifying maximum y-axis limit. character value provided, must form "qN" N number 0 100 (inclusive) representing quantile use limit. Default NULL. y.trans string specifying transformation apply y-axis. Possible values "identity" "log2". Default "identity". y.nbreaks number breaks use y-axis. Default 5. sort logical character value specifying whether sort groups x-axis. TRUE, groups sorted increasing order. FALSE, groups sorted. "increasing", groups sorted increasing order. "decreasing", groups sorted decreasing order. Default FALSE. stack logical specifying whether stack plots top . Default FALSE. flip logical specifying whether flip plot vertically. Default FALSE. comparisons list length-2 vectors. entries vector either names 2 values x-axis 2 integers correspond index groups interest, compared. ref_group string specifying reference group pairwise comparisons. Default NULL. pairwise_method Method use pairwise comparisons. Default "wilcox.test". multiplegroup_comparisons Whether add multiple group comparisons plot. Default FALSE. multiple_method Method use multiple group comparisons. Default "kruskal.test". sig_label string specifying label use significant comparisons. Possible values "p.signif" "p.format". Default "p.format". sig_labelsize size significant comparison labels. Default 3.5. aspect.ratio Aspect ratio panel. Default NULL. title text title. Default NULL. subtitle text subtitle plot displayed title. Default NULL. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab string specifying label y-axis. Default "Expression level". legend.position position legends, one "none", "left", "right", "bottom", "top". Default "right". legend.direction direction legend plot. Can one "vertical" "horizontal". legend.title Title legend. Default NULL, uses group name. theme_use Theme used. Can character string theme function. Default "theme_scop". theme_args arguments passed theme_use. Default list(). grid_major Whether show major panel grid lines. Default TRUE. grid_major_colour Color major panel grid lines. grid_major_linetype Linetype major panel grid lines. grid_major_linewidth Line width major panel grid lines. combine Combine plots single patchwork object. FALSE, return list ggplot objects. nrow Number rows combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. ncol Number columns combined plot. Default NULL, means determined automatically based number plots. byrow Whether arrange plots row combined plot. Default TRUE. force Whether force drawing regardless maximum levels cell group greater 100. Default FALSE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.
