title: Unified bulk analysis entrypoint — RunBulk
text: RunBulk() provides one bulk-strategy entrypoint Seurat-centered workflows. Methods selected one character vector, users need choose separate module argument.

title: Unified bulk analysis entrypoint — RunBulk
code: RunBulk(   srt = NULL,   bulk_se = NULL,   method = "de_edgeR_qlf",   sample.by = NULL,   condition.by = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   ref_srt = NULL,   celltype.by = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   bulk_assay = "counts",   ref_assay = NULL,   ref_layer = "counts",   condition1 = NULL,   condition2 = NULL,   de_markers_type = "single",   markers_type = NULL,   run_enrichment = FALSE,   run_gsea = FALSE,   enrichment_args = list(),   gsea_args = list(),   de_args = list(),   deconv_args = list(),   csde_args = list(),   method_args = list(),   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Unified bulk analysis entrypoint — RunBulk
text: srt Seurat object used pseudobulk mode. bulk_se SummarizedExperiment object used true bulk mode. method Character vector specifying methods run. Supported values "de_limma_voom", "de_edgeR_qlf", "de_DESeq2", "de_dream", "deconv_MuSiC", "deconv_BisqueRNA", "deconv_BayesPrism", "csde_TOAST". sample.Metadata column containing sample IDs pseudobulk mode. condition.Metadata column containing condition labels. Required .arg method includes "de" "csde". Optional deconvolution-runs. group.Optional metadata column used stratify DE subgroup. ref_srt Optional Seurat reference deconvolution/CSDE. omitted pseudobulk mode, srt used reference. celltype.Metadata column ref_srt defining reference cell types. Required deconvolution CSDE requested. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer Layer name srt used pseudobulk counts. bulk_assay Assay name bulk_se used counts matrix. ref_assay Assay name ref_srt reference profiles. ref_layer Layer name ref_srt reference counts. condition1 First condition label pairwise comparison. condition2 Second condition label pairwise comparison. de_markers_type DE comparison mode. One "single" (one pairwise comparison), "" (condition vs rest), "paired" (pairwise condition comparisons). markers_type Alias .arg de_markers_type consistency RunDEtest. provided, overrides .arg de_markers_type. run_enrichment Whether run RunEnrichment bulk DE results. run_gsea Whether run RunGSEA bulk DE results. enrichment_args Named list additional parameters RunEnrichment. gsea_args Named list additional parameters RunGSEA. de_args Named list additional parameters DE method functions. deconv_args Named list additional parameters deconvolution method functions. Current deconvolution wrappers use backend = "internal" default record computational engine result bundle. csde_args Named list additional parameters CSDE method functions. Current csde_TOAST uses backend = "limma_interaction" default records computational engine result bundle. method_args Named list method-specific parameters. Names RunBulk method names, "de_edgeR_qlf" "csde_TOAST". Method-specific values override .arg de_args, .arg deconv_args, .arg csde_args, .arg .... verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional parameters forwarded method functions.

title: Unified bulk analysis entrypoint — RunBulk
text: Returns Seurat object pseudobulk mode results srt@tools[["Bulk"]]. .arg run_enrichment .arg run_gsea TRUE, successful pathway results also stored standard srt@tools[["Enrichment_Bulk_wilcox"]] srt@tools[["GSEA_Bulk_wilcox"]] slots used EnrichmentPlot GSEAPlot. True bulk mode returns SummarizedExperiment object results metadata(bulk_se)[["Bulk"]].

title: Unified bulk analysis entrypoint — RunBulk
code: # ---------------------------- # Example 1: Seurat -> pseudobulk (DE) using scop built-in dataset # ---------------------------- if (requireNamespace("edgeR", quietly = TRUE)) {   data("pancreas_sub", package = "scop")   srt <- pancreas_sub    # Build sample/condition labels for pseudobulk aggregation.   srt$sample_id <- paste0(     "sample_",     (seq_len(ncol(srt)) - 1L) %% 8L + 1L   )   srt$condition <- ifelse(     srt$sample_id %in% paste0("sample_", 1:4),     "A",     "B"   )    srt <- RunBulk(     srt = srt,     method = "de_edgeR_qlf",     sample.by = "sample_id",     condition.by = "condition",     verbose = FALSE   )   srt@tools$Bulk$status$de$status } #> calcNormFactors has been renamed to normLibSizes #> [1] "success"  # ---------------------------- # Example 2: pure bulk (SummarizedExperiment -> DE) # ---------------------------- if (requireNamespace("edgeR", quietly = TRUE) &&   requireNamespace("SummarizedExperiment", quietly = TRUE) &&   requireNamespace("S4Vectors", quietly = TRUE)) {   data("pancreas_sub", package = "scop")   srt <- pancreas_sub   srt$sample_id <- paste0(     "sample_",     (seq_len(ncol(srt)) - 1L) %% 8L + 1L   )   srt$condition <- ifelse(     srt$sample_id %in% paste0("sample_", 1:4),     "A",     "B"   )    counts <- GetAssayData5(srt, layer = "counts")   sid <- as.character(srt$sample_id)   sid_levels <- unique(sid)   bulk_counts <- do.call(cbind, lapply(sid_levels, function(x) {     Matrix::rowSums(counts[, sid == x, drop = FALSE])   }))   colnames(bulk_counts) <- sid_levels   rownames(bulk_counts) <- rownames(counts)    sample_condition <- tapply(     as.character(srt$condition),     sid,     function(x) unique(x)[1]   )   bulk_se <- SummarizedExperiment::SummarizedExperiment(     assays = list(counts = as.matrix(bulk_counts)),     colData = S4Vectors::DataFrame(       condition = as.character(sample_condition[colnames(bulk_counts)]),       row.names = colnames(bulk_counts)     )   )    bulk_se <- RunBulk(     bulk_se = bulk_se,     method = "de_edgeR_qlf",     condition.by = "condition",     verbose = FALSE   )   S4Vectors::metadata(bulk_se)$Bulk$status$de$status } #> calcNormFactors has been renamed to normLibSizes #> [1] "success"  # ---------------------------- # Example 3: deconvolution + CSDE in one call # ---------------------------- if (requireNamespace("limma", quietly = TRUE)) {   data("pancreas_sub", package = "scop")   srt <- pancreas_sub   srt$sample_id <- paste0(     "sample_",     (seq_len(ncol(srt)) - 1L) %% 8L + 1L   )   srt$condition <- ifelse(     srt$sample_id %in% paste0("sample_", 1:4),     "A",     "B"   )   if ("CellType" %in% colnames(srt@meta.data)) {     srt$celltype <- as.character(srt$CellType)   } else {     srt$celltype <- as.character(SeuratObject::Idents(srt))   }    srt <- RunBulk(     srt = srt,     method = c("deconv_MuSiC", "csde_TOAST"),     sample.by = "sample_id",     condition.by = "condition",     condition1 = "A",     condition2 = "B",     celltype.by = "celltype",     verbose = FALSE   )   srt@tools$Bulk$status$deconv$status   srt@tools$Bulk$status$csde$status } #> [1] "success"

what: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
text: Single-cell reference mapping CSS method

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
code: RunCSSMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = srt_ref[[ref_css]]@assay.used,   ref_css = NULL,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with CSS method — RunCSSMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_css name CSS reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

title: Run CellChat analysis — RunCellChat
text: Run CellChat analysis

title: Run CellChat analysis — RunCellChat
code: RunCellChat(   srt,   group.by,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus", "zebrafish"),   split.by = NULL,   annotation_selected = NULL,   group_column = NULL,   group_cmp = NULL,   thresh = 0.05,   min.cells = 10,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellChat analysis — RunCellChat
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . species species data, either "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus", "zebrafish". split.Name column meta.data column split plot . Default NULL. annotation_selected vector cell annotations interest running CellChat analysis. provided, cell types considered. group_column Name metadata column Seurat object defines conditions groups. group_cmp list pairwise condition comparisons differential CellChat analysis. thresh threshold computing centrality scores. Default 0.05. min.cells minmum number expressed cells required genes considered cell-cell communication analysis. Default 10. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. layer layer use expression data. Default "data". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CellChat analysis — RunCellChat
text: Seurat object CellChat results stored srt@tools[["CellChat"]].

title: Run CellChat analysis — RunCellChat
text: CellChat

title: Run CellChat analysis — RunCellChat

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
text: Estimate cell cycle state Seurat gene-set scoring, scran::cyclone(), tricycle.

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
code: RunCellCycle(   srt,   method = c("Seurat", "cyclone", "tricycle"),   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   name = "CellCycle",   phase_col = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
text: srt Seurat object. method Cell cycle estimation method. One "Seurat", "cyclone", "tricycle". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer Data layer used cyclone tricycle. Default "counts". species Latin names animals, .e., "Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus" name Prefix metadata columns tricycle reduction names. Default "CellCycle". phase_col Optional metadata column used store final phase call, example "Phase". Default NULL, avoids writing compatibility phase column. overwrite Whether overwrite existing output columns. Default FALSE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed selected method.

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
text: Seurat object cell cycle metadata , tricycle, tricycle embedding reduction.

title: Run cell cycle scoring — RunCellCycle
code: data(pancreas_sub) srt <- pancreas_sub[, 1:80]  if (requireNamespace("scran", quietly = TRUE)) {   srt <- RunCellCycle(     srt,     method = "cyclone",     species = "Mus_musculus",     name = "Cyclone"   ) } #> ℹ [2026-05-14 06:55:42] Start cell cycle scoring #> 'select()' returned 1:many mapping between keys and columns #> ℹ [2026-05-14 06:55:43] Map input feature names to ENSEMBL IDs with org.Mm.eg.db for scran::cyclone #> ✔ [2026-05-14 06:55:53] Cell cycle scoring completed  if (requireNamespace("tricycle", quietly = TRUE)) {   srt <- RunCellCycle(     srt,     method = "tricycle",     species = "Mus_musculus",     name = "Tricycle"   )   if ("Cyclone_cyclone_Phase" %in% colnames(srt@meta.data)) {     CellDimPlot(       srt,       reduction = "Tricycle_tricycleEmbedding",       group.by = "Cyclone_cyclone_Phase"     )   }   FeatureDimPlot(     srt,     reduction = "Tricycle_tricycleEmbedding",     features = "Tricycle_tricyclePosition"   ) } #> ℹ [2026-05-14 06:55:53] Start cell cycle scoring #> Warning: Layer ‘data’ is empty #> Warning: Layer ‘scale.data’ is empty #> Warning: 'librarySizeFactors' is deprecated. #> Use 'scrapper::centerSizeFactors' instead. #> See help("Deprecated") #> Warning: 'normalizeCounts' is deprecated. #> Use 'scrapper::normalizeCounts' instead. #> See help("Deprecated") #> No custom reference projection matrix provided. The ref learned from mouse Neuroshpere data will be used. #> The number of projection genes found in the new data is 485. #> ✔ [2026-05-14 06:56:18] Cell cycle scoring completed

text: Run cell-level quality control

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
code: RunCellQC(   srt,   assay = "RNA",   split.by = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   return_filtered = FALSE,   qc_metrics = c("doublets", "decontX", "atac", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo",     "ribo_mito_ratio", "species"),   db_method = "scDblFinder",   db_rate = NULL,   db_coefficient = 0.01,   decontX_threshold = NULL,   decontX_batch = NULL,   decontX_background = NULL,   decontX_background_assay = NULL,   decontX_bg_batch = NULL,   decontX_assay_name = "decontXcounts",   decontX_store_assay = FALSE,   decontX_round_counts = TRUE,   decontX_args = list(),   atac_args = list(),   outlier_threshold = c("log10_nCount:lower:2.5", "log10_nCount:higher:5",     "log10_nFeature:lower:2.5", "log10_nFeature:higher:5", "featurecount_dist:lower:2.5"),   outlier_n = 1,   UMI_threshold = 3000,   gene_threshold = 1000,   mito_threshold = 20,   mito_pattern = c("MT-", "Mt-", "mt-"),   mito_gene = NULL,   ribo_threshold = 50,   ribo_pattern = c("RP[SL]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "Rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$",     "rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$"),   ribo_gene = NULL,   ribo_mito_ratio_range = c(1, Inf),   species = NULL,   species_gene_prefix = NULL,   species_percent = 95,   seed = 11 )

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
text: srt Seurat object. assay name assay used doublet-calling. Default "RNA". split.Name meta.data column used split object QC. Default NULL. specified, QC doublet-calling performed separately within split object merged back afterward. group.Group labels passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Can NULL, meta.data column name, vector aligned cells. Default NULL. return_filtered Logical indicating whether return cell-filtered Seurat object. Default FALSE. qc_metrics character vector specifying quality control metrics applied. Available metrics "doublets", "decontX", "atac", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo", "ribo_mito_ratio", "species". Default c("doublets", "decontX", "outlier", "umi", "gene", "mito", "ribo", "ribo_mito_ratio", "species"). ChromatinAssay, .arg qc_metrics supplied, default "atac". db_method Method used doublet-calling. Can one "scDblFinder", "Scrublet", "DoubletDetection", "scds_cxds", "scds_bcds", "scds_hybrid". resulting doublet labels aggregated afterward db_qc affect thresholds used QC metrics. db_rate expected doublet rate. Default calculated ncol(srt) / 1000 * 0.01. db_coefficient coefficient used calculate doublet rate. Default 0.01. Doublet rate calculated ncol(srt) / 1000 * db_coefficient. decontX_threshold Optional contamination threshold used filter cells running RunDecontX(). Cells decontX_contamination greater value marked failed decontX_qc. Default NULL, computes decontX results without filtering cells contamination. decontX_batch Batch labels passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Default NULL. decontX_background Optional background / empty-droplet input passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Default NULL. decontX_background_assay Assay name used decontX_background Seurat object SingleCellExperiment. Default NULL. decontX_bg_batch Batch labels decontX_background passed RunDecontX(). Default NULL. decontX_assay_name Name assay used store decontaminated counts RunDecontX(). Default "decontXcounts". decontX_store_assay Whether store decontaminated counts new assay running RunDecontX(). Default FALSE. decontX_round_counts Whether round decontaminated counts creating assay RunDecontX(). Default TRUE. decontX_args named list additional advanced arguments passed RunDecontX() "decontX" included qc_metrics. Explicit decontX_* parameters preferred common options take precedence supplied. Default list(). atac_args named list additional arguments passed RunATACQC() "atac" included qc_metrics. Threshold arguments RunATACQC() used label failed cells atac_qc, filtering deferred RunCellQC(). Default list(). outlier_threshold character vector specifying outlier threshold. Default c("log10_nCount:lower:2.5", "log10_nCount:higher:5", "log10_nFeature:lower:2.5", "log10_nFeature:higher:5", "featurecount_dist:lower:2.5"). outlier_n Minimum number outlier metrics meet conditions determining outlier cells. Default 1. UMI_threshold UMI number threshold. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 3000. gene_threshold Gene number threshold. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 1000. mito_threshold Percentage UMI counts mitochondrial genes. Cells exceed threshold considered discarded. Default 20. mito_pattern Regex patterns match mitochondrial genes. Default c("MT-", "Mt-", "mt-"). mito_gene defined mitochondrial genes. features provided, ignore mito_pattern matching. Default NULL. ribo_threshold Percentage UMI counts ribosomal genes. Cells exceed threshold considered discarded. Default 50. ribo_pattern Regex patterns match ribosomal genes. Default c("RP[SL]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "Rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$", "rp[sl]\\d+\\w{0,1}\\d*$"). ribo_gene defined ribosomal genes. features provided, ignore ribo_pattern matching. Default NULL. ribo_mito_ratio_range numeric vector specifying range ribosomal/mitochondrial gene expression ratios ribo_mito_ratio outlier cells. Default c(1, Inf). species Species used suffix QC metrics. first species interest. Default NULL. species_gene_prefix Species gene prefix used calculate QC metrics species. Default NULL. species_percent Percentage UMI counts first species. Cells exceed threshold considered kept. Default 95. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run cell-level quality control — RunCellQC
text: Returns Seurat object QC results stored meta.data layer.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: CellRank toolkit studying cellular dynamics using Markov state modeling.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
code: RunCellRank(   srt = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   adata = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   cores = 1,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   mode = "stochastic",   fitting_by = "stochastic",   magic_impute = FALSE,   knn = 5,   t = 2,   min_shared_counts = 30,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   stream_smooth = NULL,   stream_density = 2,   arrow_size = 5,   arrow_length = 5,   arrow_density = 0.5,   calculate_velocity_genes = FALSE,   denoise = FALSE,   kinetics = FALSE,   kernel_type = c("velocity", "pseudotime", "cytotrace"),   time_key = "dpt_pseudotime",   estimator_type = c("GPCCA", "CFLARE"),   use_connectivity_kernel = TRUE,   velocity_weight = 0.8,   connectivity_weight = 0.2,   softmax_scale = 4,   n_macrostates = NULL,   schur_method = c("krylov", "brandts"),   n_cells_terminal = 10,   show_plot = TRUE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "cellrank",   legend.position = "on data",   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   dirpath = "./cellrank",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". adata anndata object. Default NULL. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . cores number cores use cellrank. linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". mode Velocity estimation models use. Can "deterministic", "stochastic", "dynamical". fitting_by Method used fit gene velocities dynamical modeling. Default "stochastic". magic_impute Flag indicating whether perform magic imputation. Default FALSE. knn number nearest neighbors magic.MAGIC. Default 5. t Power diffusion operator powered magic.MAGIC. Default 2. min_shared_counts Minimum number counts (unspliced spliced) required gene. Default 30. n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. stream_smooth Multiplication factor scale Gaussian kernel around grid point. stream_density Controls closeness streamlines. density = 2 (default), domain divided 60x60 grid, whereas density linearly scales grid. cell grid can , , one traversing streamline. Default 2. arrow_size Size arrows. Default 5. arrow_length Length arrows. arrow_density Amount velocities show. calculate_velocity_genes Boolean flag indicating whether calculate velocity genes. denoise Boolean flag indicating whether denoise. kinetics Boolean flag indicating whether estimate RNA kinetics. kernel_type Type kernel use: "velocity" (default, requires spliced/unspliced), "pseudotime" (requires pre-computed pseudotime auto-computes DPT), "cytotrace" (auto-computes CytoTRACE score, suitable RNA-data). time_key Key metadata pseudotime. Used kernel_type = "pseudotime". key exist, DPT pseudotime computed automatically. Default "dpt_pseudotime". estimator_type Type estimator use: "GPCCA" (default) "CFLARE". GPCCA provides coarse-grained analysis Schur decomposition. use_connectivity_kernel Whether combine main kernel ConnectivityKernel. Default TRUE. velocity_weight Weight VelocityKernel combining ConnectivityKernel. Default 0.8. connectivity_weight Weight ConnectivityKernel combining VelocityKernel. Default 0.2. Weights automatically normalized sum 1.0. softmax_scale Scaling parameter softmax transformation velocity kernel. Default 4. n_macrostates Number macrostates compute. NULL (default), automatically determined based eigenvalue spectrum. schur_method Method Schur decomposition: "krylov" "brandts". used GPCCA estimator. n_cells_terminal Minimum number cells required state considered terminal. Default 10. show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank
text: Returns Seurat object return_seurat = TRUE anndata object CellRank results stored obsm, obs, varm slots. estimator kernel objects stored srt@misc$cellrank.

title: Run CellRank analysis — RunCellRank

what: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
text: CellTypist automated cell type annotation tool scRNA-seq datasets based logistic regression classifiers. function runs CellTypist annotation Seurat object AnnData object.

title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
code: RunCellTypist(   srt = NULL,   adata = NULL,   assay = "RNA",   layer = "data",   model = "Immune_All_Low.pkl",   mode = "best match",   p_thres = 0.5,   majority_voting = FALSE,   over_clustering = NULL,   min_prop = 0,   use_GPU = FALSE,   insert_labels = TRUE,   insert_conf = TRUE,   insert_conf_by = "predicted_labels",   insert_prob = FALSE,   insert_decision = FALSE,   prefix = "celltypist_",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. adata Optional AnnData object used input. assay assay use. Default "RNA". layer layer use. Default data. model Model name path. Default "Immune_All_Low.pkl". Supports three formats: Model name (e.g., "Immune_All_Low.pkl"): automatically searched ~/.celltypist/data/models/ Full path (contains /): use provided path directly NULL: use default model summary list returned TrainCellTypist(): use model_path mode Prediction mode: "best match" "prob match". Default "best match". p_thres Probability threshold "prob match" mode. Default 0.5. majority_voting Whether use majority voting. Default FALSE. over_clustering -clustering result. Can : String: column name Seurat metadata AnnData obs Vector: -clustering labels NULL: use heuristic -clustering min_prop Minimum proportion majority voting. Default 0. use_GPU Whether use GPU -clustering. Default FALSE. insert_labels Whether insert predicted labels. Default TRUE. insert_conf Whether insert confidence scores. Default TRUE. insert_conf_by prediction type base confidence . Default "predicted_labels". insert_prob Whether insert probability matrix. Default FALSE. insert_decision Whether insert decision matrix. Default FALSE. prefix Prefix inserted columns. Default "celltypist_". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist
text: AnnData object Seurat object depending return_seurat argument.

title: Run CellTypist cell type annotation — RunCellTypist

title: Run CellphoneDB analysis — RunCellphoneDB
code: RunCellphoneDB(   srt,   group.by,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   counts_data = c("hgnc_symbol", "ensembl", "gene_name"),   method = c("statistical_analysis", "analysis", "degs_analysis"),   cpdb_file_path = NULL,   convert_to_human = TRUE,   gene_id_from_IDtype = "symbol",   microenvs = NULL,   active_tfs = NULL,   degs = NULL,   score_interactions = TRUE,   threshold = 0.1,   pvalue = 0.05,   iterations = 1000,   cores = 1,   separator = "|",   debug = FALSE,   debug_seed = 42,   result_precision = 3,   subsampling = FALSE,   subsampling_log = FALSE,   subsampling_num_pc = 100,   subsampling_num_cells = 1000,   output_path = NULL,   output_suffix = NULL,   keep_output = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CellphoneDB analysis — RunCellphoneDB
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . species Species input data. CellphoneDB human-centric; non-human species supplied convert_to_human = TRUE, gene symbols converted human ortholog symbols running analysis. assay Assay use. layer Layer use CellphoneDB input. Default "data" CellphoneDB generally expects normalized expression. counts_data Gene identifier type used CellphoneDB. One "hgnc_symbol", "ensembl", "gene_name". method CellphoneDB analysis mode. One "statistical_analysis", "analysis", "degs_analysis". cpdb_file_path Path cellphonedb.zip. NULL, wrapper try common locations download automatically found. convert_to_human Whether convert non-human gene symbols human ortholog symbols running CellphoneDB. gene_id_from_IDtype Input gene identifier type passed GeneConvert convert_to_human = TRUE. microenvs Optional CellphoneDB microenvironment specification. Can data.frame file path. active_tfs Optional CellphoneDB active TF specification. Can data.frame file path. degs Optional DEG table method = "degs_analysis". Can data.frame file path. score_interactions Whether compute CellphoneDB interaction scores. threshold Minimum fraction cells expressing gene gene considered. pvalue P-value threshold used CellphoneDB. iterations Number permutations statistical analysis. cores Number cores used CellphoneDB. separator Separator used CellphoneDB sender/receiver pair columns. debug Whether ask CellphoneDB save intermediate debug tables. debug_seed Random seed used CellphoneDB. result_precision Result precision used CellphoneDB. subsampling Whether enable CellphoneDB subsampling. subsampling_log Whether log-transform CellphoneDB subsampling. subsampling_num_pc Number PCs used CellphoneDB subsampling. subsampling_num_cells Number cells retained CellphoneDB subsampling. output_path Optional directory keep CellphoneDB output files. output_suffix Optional output suffix passed CellphoneDB. keep_output Whether keep temporary output files output_path supplied. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CellphoneDB analysis — RunCellphoneDB
text: Seurat object results stored srt@tools[["CellphoneDB"]].

what: Co-embed reference and query cells — RunCoEmbedding
title: Co-embed reference and query cells — RunCoEmbedding
text: Impute reference expression query cells TransferData, merge reference query cells, compute PCA/UMAP shared expression space. current implementation mirrors Seurat ATAC integration vignette ATAC query RNA reference.

title: Co-embed reference and query cells — RunCoEmbedding
code: RunCoEmbedding(   srt,   reference,   assay = NULL,   reference_assay = NULL,   reference_reduction = "pca",   reference_dims = 1:30,   gene_activity_assay = "ACTIVITY",   weight_reduction = NULL,   dims = 2:30,   genes_use = NULL,   imputed_assay = "RNA",   modality_col = "modality",   coembed_prefix = "CoEmbed",   npcs = 30,   umap_dims = 1:30,   k.weight = 100,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Co-embed reference and query cells — RunCoEmbedding
text: srt Seurat object. reference RNA reference Seurat object used label transfer. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. reference_assay Assay used reference object. reference_reduction Reduction used reference object. reference_dims Dimensions used reference reduction. gene_activity_assay Name gene activity assay used mapping. weight_reduction Reduction srt used weight transferred labels. NULL, ATAC linear reduction resolved automatically ATAC_default_linear_reduction, {prefix}lsi, {prefix}svd, current default reduction. dims Query reduction dimensions used TransferData. genes_use Genes/features used expression imputation co-embedding. NULL, reference variable features used. imputed_assay Assay name imputed RNA expression ATAC cells. modality_col Metadata column storing RNA/ATAC origin merge. coembed_prefix Prefix co-embedding reductions. npcs Number PCs compute. umap_dims PC dimensions used UMAP. k.weight Number neighbors used weighting transfer anchors. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed used UMAP.

title: Run CytoSPACE spatial assignment — RunCytoSPACE
text: Assign reference single cells spatial transcriptomics spots using native R/C++ implementation default CytoSPACE spot-level workflow.

title: Run CytoSPACE spatial assignment — RunCytoSPACE
code: RunCytoSPACE(   srt,   reference,   reference_label,   assay = NULL,   reference_assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   reference_layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   cell_fractions = NULL,   n_cells_per_spot = NULL,   mean_cell_numbers = 5,   scRNA_max_transcripts_per_cell = 1500,   sampling_method = "duplicates",   seed = 1,   prefix = "CytoSPACE",   store_results = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run CytoSPACE spatial assignment — RunCytoSPACE
text: srt Seurat object. reference Reference Seurat object containing annotated single cells. reference_label Metadata column reference cell type labels. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. reference_assay Assay used reference. layer, reference_layer Assay layers used spatial reference expression. features Features used assignment. NULL, shared features used. cell_fractions Optional cell-type fractions. Provide named numeric vector, one-row matrix/data.frame, spot--cell-type matrix/data.frame. Spot-level rows aggregated global composition used default CytoSPACE assignment workflow. n_cells_per_spot Optional number cells assigned spatial spot. NULL, counts estimated spatial RNA reads mean_cell_numbers. mean_cell_numbers Mean number cells per spot. Default 5, matching CytoSPACE Visium default. scRNA_max_transcripts_per_cell Maximum reference transcripts per cell assignment. Default 1500, matching CytoSPACE. sampling_method Sampling method. "duplicates" supported package runtime. seed Random seed used deterministic reference downsampling duplicate sampling. prefix Prefix metadata columns. store_results Whether store detailed assignment results srt@tools. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CytoSPACE spatial assignment — RunCytoSPACE
text: Seurat object CytoSPACE metadata columns detailed results stored srt@tools[["CytoSPACE"]].

title: Run CytoSPACE spatial assignment — RunCytoSPACE
code: data(visium_human_pancreas_sub) data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_human <- ConvertHomologs(   pancreas_sub,   species_from = "Mus_musculus",   species_to = "Homo_sapiens",   verbose = FALSE ) spatial <- RunCytoSPACE(   visium_human_pancreas_sub,   reference = pancreas_human,   reference_label = "CellType",   mean_cell_numbers = 1,   verbose = FALSE )  SpatialSpotPlot(   visium_human_pancreas_sub,   group.by = "coda_label",   theme_use = "theme_scop" )   SpatialSpotPlot(   spatial,   group.by = "CytoSPACE_dominant_type",   theme_use = "theme_scop" )

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: Predicts cellular developmental potential single-cell RNA-seq data using CytoTRACE 2 algorithm (Kang et al., 2025). native scop implementation C++ acceleration. algorithm consists five stages: Preprocessing: Gene orthology mapping, feature selection, ranking, log2-CPM transformation. GSBN Ensemble Prediction: 19 pre-trained Gene Set Binary Network models predict continuous developmental potency score (0-1) discrete potency category. Diffusion Smoothing: Markov random-walk--restart cell-cell similarity graph smooths raw scores. Binning: Within potency category, cells ranked linearly scaled corresponding segments unit interval. Adaptive kNN Smoothing: PCA-based nearest-neighbor consensus refinement final scores.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
code: RunCytoTRACE(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunCytoTRACE(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = c("counts", "data"),   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   batch_size = 10000,   smooth_batch_size = 1000,   cores = 1,   seed = 14,   data_dir = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunCytoTRACE(   object,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   batch_size = 10000,   smooth_batch_size = 1000,   cores = 1,   seed = 14,   data_dir = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: object object. can Seurat object matrix-like object (genes rows, cells columns). ... Additional arguments (reserved future use). assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default "counts". species species input data. Currently supported values "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". Default "Homo_sapiens". batch_size number cells process . datasets cells value, cells randomly split batches processed independently. batching NULL. Default 10000. smooth_batch_size number cells per subsample diffusion smoothing step. diffusion subsampling NULL. Default 1000. cores Number cores parallel processing. Default 1. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 14. data_dir Path directory containing CytoTRACE2 model data files. NULL, uses data prepared PrepareDB(), user data cache, auto-downloads datasets repository. Default NULL. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: input Seurat object, function returns Seurat object following metadata columns added: CytoTRACE2_Score: final predicted cellular potency score (0-1) CytoTRACE2_Potency: final predicted cellular potency category (Differentiated, Unipotent, Oligopotent, Multipotent, Pluripotent, Totipotent) CytoTRACE2_Relative: predicted relative order (normalized 0-1) preKNN_CytoTRACE2_Score: potency score KNN smoothing preKNN_CytoTRACE2_Potency: potency category KNN smoothing input matrix data.frame, function returns data.frame columns , cell IDs row names.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: CytoTRACE 2 model associated data files provided Stanford Non-Commercial Software License Agreement. Commercial entities wishing use software contact Stanford University's Office Technology Licensing (docket S24-057). See https://github.com/mengxu98/datasets/blob/main/CytoTRACE2/LICENSE complete terms.

title: Run CytoTRACE 2 — RunCytoTRACE
text: Kang, M., Brown, E., Almagro Armenteros, J.J. et al. "Improved reconstruction single-cell developmental potential CytoTRACE 2." Nature Methods (2025). doi:10.1038/s41592-025-02857-2 Model data: https://github.com/mengxu98/datasets/tree/main/CytoTRACE2

title: Differential gene test — RunDEtest
text: function utilizes Seurat package perform differential expression (DE) test gene expression data. Users flexibility specify custom cell groups, marker types, various options DE analysis.

title: Differential gene test — RunDEtest
code: RunDEtest(   srt,   group.by = NULL,   group1 = NULL,   group2 = NULL,   cells1 = NULL,   cells2 = NULL,   features = NULL,   feature_type = c("gene", "peak", "cCRE"),   markers_type = c("all", "paired", "conserved", "disturbed"),   grouping.var = NULL,   meta.method = c("maximump", "minimump", "wilkinsonp", "meanp", "sump", "votep"),   test.use = "wilcox",   only.pos = TRUE,   fc.threshold = 1.5,   base = 2,   pseudocount.use = 1,   mean.fxn = NULL,   min.pct = 0.1,   min.diff.pct = -Inf,   max.cells.per.ident = Inf,   latent.vars = NULL,   min.cells.feature = 3,   min.cells.group = 3,   norm.method = "LogNormalize",   sample_col = NULL,   condition_col = NULL,   p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",   layer = "data",   assay = NULL,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE,   cores = 1,   ... )

title: Differential gene test — RunDEtest
text: srt Seurat object. group.grouping variable dataset define groups conditions differential test. provided, function uses "active.ident" variable Seurat object. group1 vector cell IDs character vector specifying cells belong first group. group.group1 provided, group1 takes precedence. sample-level methods ("edgeR" "limma"), parameter interpreted first condition label. group2 vector cell IDs character vector specifying cells belong second group. parameter used group.group1 provided. sample-level methods ("edgeR" "limma"), parameter interpreted second condition label. cells1 vector cell IDs specifying cells belong group1. provided, group1 ignored. cells2 vector cell IDs specifying cells belong group2. parameter used cells1 provided. features vector feature names specifying features consider differential test. provided, features dataset considered. feature_type Feature type used differential testing. Default "gene". markers_type character value specifying type markers find. Possible values "", "paired", "conserved", "disturbed". Sample-level methods ("edgeR" "limma") currently support "". grouping.var character value specifying grouping variable finding conserved disturbed markers. parameter used markers_type "conserved" "disturbed". meta.method character value specifying method use combining p-values conserved markers test. Possible values "maximump", "minimump", "wilkinsonp", "meanp", "sump", "votep". test.use Differential testing method. "edgeR" "limma" run sample-level pseudobulk differential testing. .pos return positive markers (FALSE default) fc.threshold numeric value used filter genes testing based average fold change /among two groups. Default 1.5. base base respect logarithms computed. pseudocount.use Pseudocount add averaged expression values calculating logFC. 1 default. mean.fxn Function use fold change average difference calculation. default depends value fc.slot: "counts" : difference log mean counts, pseudocount. "data" : difference log average exponentiated data, pseudocount.  adjusts differences sequencing depth cells, assumes "data"  log-normalized. "scale.data" : difference means scale.data. min.pct test genes detected minimum fraction min.pct cells either two populations. Meant speed function testing genes infrequently expressed. Default 0.01 min.diff.pct test genes show minimum difference fraction detection two groups. Set -Inf default max.cells.per.ident sample identity class max number. Default downsampling. activated default (set Inf) latent.vars Variables test, used test.use one 'LR', 'negbinom', 'poisson', 'MAST' min.cells.feature Minimum number cells expressing feature least one two groups, currently used poisson negative binomial tests min.cells.group Minimum number cells one groups norm.method Normalization method fold change calculation layer 'data'. Default "LogNormalize". sample_col Metadata column storing biological sample IDs. Required test.use "edgeR" "limma". condition_col Metadata column storing condition labels. Required test.use "edgeR" "limma". p.adjust.method character value specifying method use adjusting p-values. Default "bonferroni". layer layer use. Default data. assay Assay use differential expression testing seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. ... Additional arguments pass Seurat::FindMarkers function.

title: Run diffusion map (DM) — RunDM
text: Run diffusion map (DM)

title: Run diffusion map (DM) — RunDM
code: RunDM(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunDM(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = 1:30,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   ndcs = 2,   sigma = "local",   k = 30,   dist.method = "euclidean",   npcs = NULL,   reduction.name = "dm",   reduction.key = "DM_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunDM(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   ndcs = 2,   sigma = "local",   k = 30,   dist.method = "euclidean",   npcs = NULL,   reduction.key = "DM_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run diffusion map (DM) — RunDM
text: object object. can Seurat object matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed destiny::DiffusionMap. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. ndcs number diffusion components (dimensions) computed. Default 2. sigma diffusion scale parameter Gaussian kernel. Currently supported values "local" (default) "global". k number nearest neighbors used construction graph. Default 30. dist.method distance metric used construction knn graph. Currently supported values "euclidean" "cosine". Default "euclidean". npcs Number principal components use dimensionality reduction computing diffusion map. can speed computation using many features. Default NULL (auto-determined based number features). reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "dm". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "DM_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

Default NULL. background Optional background / empty-droplet input passed decontX::decontX(). Can Seurat object, SingleCellExperiment, count matrix. Default NULL. background_assay Assay name used background Seurat object SingleCellExperiment. Default NULL, falls back assay Seurat background "counts" SingleCellExperiment background. bg_batch Batch labels background passed decontX::decontX(). Can NULL, metadata column name, vector aligned background droplets. Default NULL. assay_name Name assay used store decontaminated counts. Default "decontXcounts". store_assay Whether store decontaminated counts new assay. Default TRUE. round_counts Whether round decontaminated counts creating assay. Default FALSE. data_type Optional precomputed result CheckDataType() input assay. Primarily used internally avoid repeated scans count matrix across nested QC calls. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. ... Additional arguments passed decontX::decontX().

title: Estimate useful dimensions from a reduction — RunDimsEstimate
text: srt Seurat object. reduction Name dimensional reduction inspect. Default NULL, automatically selects PCA-like reduction via DefaultReduction() pattern = "pca". reduction_method Optional reduction method name. set "nmf" "glmpca", available dimensions retained. k Number neighbors used intrinsicDimension::maxLikGlobalDimEst. Default 20. min_dims Minimum number dimensions kept intrinsic-dimension estimation succeeds. Default 20. fallback_max_dims Maximum number dimensions kept valid estimate available. Default 50. skip_first Whether drop first dimension returned result. Useful TFIDF/LSI workflows. Default FALSE. use_stored Whether use misc$dims_estimate already stored reduction available. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run dimension reduction — RunDimsReduction
text: srt Seurat object. prefix prefix used name result. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. Default "counts". linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". linear_reduction_dims Total number dimensions compute store linear_reduction. linear_reduction_params parameters passed linear_reduction method. force_linear_reduction Whether force linear dimension reduction. nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". nonlinear_reduction_dims Total number dimensions compute store nonlinear_reduction. reduction_use dimensional reduction use input nonlinear_reduction. reduction_dims dimensions use input nonlinear_reduction, used features NULL. graph_use Name graph use nonlinear_reduction. neighbor_use Name neighbor use nonlinear_reduction. nonlinear_reduction_params parameters passed nonlinear_reduction method. force_nonlinear_reduction Whether force nonlinear dimension reduction. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: RunDynamicEnrichment — RunDynamicEnrichment
text: function calculates gene-set scores specified database (db) lineage using specified scoring method (score_method). treats scores expression values uses input RunDynamicFeatures function identify dynamically enriched terms along lineage.

title: RunDynamicEnrichment — RunDynamicEnrichment
code: RunDynamicEnrichment(   srt,   lineages,   score_method = "AUCell",   layer = "data",   assay = NULL,   min_expcells = 20,   r.sq = 0.2,   dev.expl = 0.2,   padjust = 0.05,   IDtype = "symbol",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   cpp_strategy = c("sparse", "topk", "full"),   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: RunDynamicEnrichment — RunDynamicEnrichment
text: srt Seurat object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest). specified, genes groups extracted Seurat object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. lineages character vector specifying lineage names dynamic features calculated. score_method method use scoring. Can "Seurat", "AUCell", "UCell". Default "Seurat". layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. min_expcells minimum number expected cells. Default 20. r.sq R-squared threshold. Default 0.2. dev.expl deviance explained threshold. Default 0.2. padjust p-value adjustment threshold. Default 0.05. IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. backend Enrichment backend. "cpp" default uses fast native hypergeometric ORA implementation returns enrichment table without enrichResult objects. "r" uses clusterProfiler::enricher() returns enrichResult objects results. GO_simplify = TRUE currently uses R backend. cpp_strategy C++ AUCell ranking strategy. "sparse" ranks non-zero genes approximates zero ties, "topk" ranks genes can contribute AUCell AUC, "full" ranks genes. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
text: Calculates dynamic features lineages

title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
code: RunDynamicFeatures(   srt,   lineages,   features = NULL,   suffix = lineages,   n_candidates = 1000,   minfreq = 5,   family = NULL,   layer = "counts",   assay = NULL,   libsize = NULL,   fit_method = c("gam", "pretsa"),   knot = 0,   max_knot_allowed = 10,   padjust_method = "fdr",   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE,   seed = 11 )

title: Calculates dynamic features for lineages — RunDynamicFeatures
text: srt Seurat object. lineages character vector specifying lineage names dynamic features calculated. features character vector features use. NULL, n_candidates must provided. suffix character vector specifying suffix append output layer names lineage. Default lineage names. n_candidates number candidate features select features NULL. Default 1000. minfreq integer specifying minimum frequency threshold candidate features. Features frequency less minfreq excluded. Default 5. family character character vector specifying family distributions use GAM. family set NULL, appropriate family automatically determined based data. length(family) 1, family used features. Otherwise, family must length features. layer layer use. Default "counts". assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. libsize numeric numeric vector specifying library size correction factors cell. NULL, library size correction factors calculated based expression matrix. length(libsize) 1, value used cells. Otherwise, libsize must length number cells srt. Default NULL. fit_method method used fitting features. Either "gam" (generalized additive models) "pretsa" (Pattern recognition Temporal Spatial Analyses). Default "gam". knot fit_method = "pretsa": B-spline knots. 0 "auto". Default 0. max_knot_allowed fit_method = "pretsa" knot = "auto": max knots. Default 10. padjust_method method used p-value adjustment. Default "fdr". cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
code: RunEnrichment(   srt = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   test.use = "wilcox",   DE_threshold = "avg_log2FC > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05",   geneID = NULL,   geneID_groups = NULL,   geneID_exclude = NULL,   IDtype = "symbol",   result_IDtype = "symbol",   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   db_combine = FALSE,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   unlimited_db = c("Chromosome", "GeneType", "TF", "Enzyme", "CSPA"),   GO_simplify = FALSE,   GO_simplify_cutoff = "p.adjust < 0.05",   simplify_method = "Wang",   simplify_similarityCutoff = 0.7,   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
text: srt Seurat object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest). specified, genes groups extracted Seurat object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character vector specifying test used differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. DE_threshold character vector specifying filter condition differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. geneID character vector specifying gene IDs. geneID_groups factor vector specifying group labels gene. geneID_exclude character vector specifying gene IDs excluded analysis. IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. result_IDtype character vector specifying desired type gene ID used output. argument used convert gene IDs IDtype result_IDtype. backend Enrichment backend. "cpp" default uses fast native hypergeometric ORA implementation returns enrichment table without enrichResult objects. "r" uses clusterProfiler::enricher() returns enrichResult objects results. GO_simplify = TRUE currently uses R backend. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether combine multiple databases one. TRUE, database specified db combined one named "Combined". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. unlimited_db character vector specifying names databases size restrictions. GO_simplify Whether simplify GO terms. TRUE, additional results simplified GO terms returned. GO_simplify_cutoff character vector specifying filter condition simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_method character vector specifying method used simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_similarityCutoff similarity cutoff simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (over-representation) on the genes — RunEnrichment
text: input Seurat object, returns modified Seurat object enrichment result stored tools slot. input geneID vector without geneID_groups, return enrichment result directly. Enrichment result list following component: enrichment: data.frame containing enrichment results. results: list enrichResult objects DOSE package. geneMap: data.frame containing ID mapping table input gene IDs. input: data.frame containing input gene IDs gene ID groups. DE_threshold: specific threshold differential expression analysis (returned input Seurat object).

title: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm) — RunFR
code: RunFR(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunFR(   object,   reduction = NULL,   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   graph = NULL,   neighbor = NULL,   k.param = 20,   ndim = 2,   niter = 500,   reduction.name = "FR",   reduction.key = "FR_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunFR(   object,   assay = NULL,   ndim = 2,   niter = 500,   reduction.key = "FR_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )

title: Run Force-Directed Layout (Fruchterman-Reingold algorithm) — RunFR
text: object object. can Seurat object, Neighbor object, Graph object. Default NULL. ... Additional arguments passed igraph::layout_with_fr. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. graph name Graph object used. Default NULL. neighbor name Neighbor object used. Default NULL. k.param number nearest neighbors consider. Default 20. ndim number dimensions force-directed layout. Default 2. niter number iterations force-directed layout. Default 500. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "fr". reduction.key prefix column names force-directed layout embeddings. Default "FR_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

code: RunGLMPCA(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.name = "glmpca",   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay' RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay5' RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunGLMPCA(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   L = 5,   fam = c("poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern"),   rev.gmlpca = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "GLMPC_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run generalized principal components analysis (GLMPCA) — RunGLMPCA
text: object object. Can Seurat object, assay object, matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed glmpca::glmpca function. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. features character vector features use. Default NULL. L number components computed. Default 5. fam family generalized linear model used. Currently supported values "poi", "nb", "nb2", "binom", "mult", "bern". Default "poi". rev.gmlpca Whether perform reverse GLMPCA (.e., transpose input matrix) running analysis. Default FALSE. ndims.print dimensions (number components) print output. Default 1:5. nfeatures.print number features print output. Default 30. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "glmpca". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "GLMPC_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (GSEA) on the genes — RunGSEA
code: RunGSEA(   srt = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   test.use = "wilcox",   DE_threshold = "p_val_adj < 0.05",   scoreType = "std",   geneID = NULL,   geneScore = NULL,   geneID_groups = NULL,   geneID_exclude = NULL,   IDtype = "symbol",   result_IDtype = "symbol",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   db = "GO_BP",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   db_combine = FALSE,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   unlimited_db = c("Chromosome", "GeneType", "TF", "Enzyme", "CSPA"),   GO_simplify = FALSE,   GO_simplify_cutoff = "p.adjust < 0.05",   simplify_method = "Wang",   simplify_similarityCutoff = 0.7,   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (GSEA) on the genes — RunGSEA
text: srt Seurat object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest). specified, genes groups extracted Seurat object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . test.use character vector specifying test used differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. DE_threshold character vector specifying filter condition differential expression analysis. argument used srt specified. scoreType parameter defines GSEA score type. Possible options "std", "pos", "neg". default ("std") enrichment score computed original GSEA. "pos" "neg" score types intended used one-tailed tests (.e. one interested positive ("pos") negateive ("neg") enrichment). geneID character vector specifying gene IDs. geneScore numeric vector specifies gene scores, example, log2(fold change) values gene expression. geneID_groups factor vector specifying group labels gene. geneID_exclude character vector specifying gene IDs excluded analysis. IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. result_IDtype character vector specifying desired type gene ID used output. argument used convert gene IDs IDtype result_IDtype. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether combine multiple databases one. TRUE, database specified db combined one named "Combined". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. unlimited_db character vector specifying names databases size restrictions. GO_simplify Whether simplify GO terms. TRUE, additional results simplified GO terms returned. GO_simplify_cutoff character vector specifying filter condition simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_method character vector specifying method used simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. simplify_similarityCutoff similarity cutoff simplification GO terms. argument used GO_simplify TRUE. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Perform the enrichment analysis (GSEA) on the genes — RunGSEA
text: input Seurat object, returns modified Seurat object enrichment result stored tools slot. input geneID vector without geneID_groups, return enrichment result directly. Enrichment result list following component: enrichment: data.frame containing enrichment results. results: list gseaResult objects DOSE package. geneMap: data.frame containing ID mapping table input gene IDs. input: data.frame containing input gene IDs gene ID groups. DE_threshold: specific threshold differential expression analysis (returned input Seurat object).

what: Perform Gene Set Variation Analysis (GSVA) — RunGSVA
title: Perform Gene Set Variation Analysis (GSVA) — RunGSVA
text: Perform Gene Set Variation Analysis (GSVA)

title: Perform Gene Set Variation Analysis (GSVA) — RunGSVA
code: RunGSVA(   srt = NULL,   assay = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   layer = "data",   assay_name = "GSVA",   new_assay = TRUE,   db = "GO_BP",   species = "Homo_sapiens",   IDtype = "symbol",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   db_combine = FALSE,   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   TERM2GENE = NULL,   TERM2NAME = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   unlimited_db = c("Chromosome", "GeneType", "TF", "Enzyme", "CSPA"),   method = c("gsva", "ssgsea", "zscore", "plage"),   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   cpp_chunk_size = NULL,   kcdf = c("Gaussian", "Poisson"),   abs.ranking = FALSE,   min.sz = 10,   max.sz = Inf,   mx.diff = TRUE,   tau = 1,   ssgsea.norm = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Perform Gene Set Variation Analysis (GSVA) — RunGSVA
text: srt Seurat object containing results differential expression analysis (RunDEtest). specified, genes groups extracted Seurat object automatically. specified, geneID geneID_groups arguments must provided. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. group.Name metadata column group cells averaging expression. provided, expression averaged within group GSVA analysis (cell-type level). NULL, GSVA performed cell individually (single-cell level). layer Data layer use group.= NULL. Usually "data" normalized "counts" count matrix. Default "data". assay_name Name assay store GSVA scores group.= NULL new_assay = TRUE. Default "GSVA". new_assay Whether create new assay GSVA scores group.= NULL. Default TRUE. db character vector specifying annotation sources included gene annotation databases. Can one "GO", "GO_BP", "GO_CC", "GO_MF", "KEGG", "WikiPathway", "Reactome", "CORUM", "MP", "", "HPO", "PFAM", "CSPA", "Surfaceome", "SPRomeDB", "VerSeDa", "TFLink", "hTFtarget", "TRRUST", "JASPAR", "ENCODE", "MSigDB", "CellTalk", "CellChat", "Chromosome", "GeneType", "Enzyme", "TF", "CytoTRACE2". Note: "CytoTRACE2" species-independent downloads pre-trained model data required RunCytoTRACE. species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". db_combine Whether combine multiple databases one. TRUE, database specified db combined one named "Combined". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". TERM2GENE data frame specifying gene-term mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain gene IDs. TERM2NAME data frame specifying term-name mapping custom database. first column contain term IDs, second column contain corresponding term names. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. unlimited_db character vector specifying names databases size restrictions. method method use GSVA. Options "gsva", "ssgsea", "zscore", "plage". Default "gsva". backend Scoring backend. "cpp" default supports current method values. "r" uses original GSVA::gsva() implementation. "cpp" supports method = "ssgsea", method = "zscore", method = "plage", method = "gsva" kcdf = "Gaussian" kcdf = "Poisson". PLAGE scores oriented non-negative dot product gene set mean z-score SVD signs deterministic. cpp_chunk_size Optional cell chunk size C++ GSVA kernels. NULL "auto" automatically chunks large matrices reduce peak dense intermediate memory; positive values set chunk size manually. kcdf kernel cumulative distribution function used GSVA. Options "Gaussian" (continuous data) "Poisson" (count data). Default "Gaussian". abs.ranking Logical indicating whether use absolute ranking GSVA. Default FALSE. min.sz Minimum size gene sets included analysis. Default 10. max.sz Maximum size gene sets included analysis. Default Inf. mx.diff Logical indicating whether use maximum difference method. Default TRUE. tau Exponent GSVA method. Default 1. ssgsea.norm Logical indicating whether normalize SSGSEA scores. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Perform Gene Set Variation Analysis (GSVA) — RunGSVA
text: Returns modified Seurat object. group.provided, GSVA scores stored tools slot. group.= NULL, scores stored new assay (new_assay = TRUE) tools slot.

title: Run Harmony algorithm — RunHarmony2
text: modified version harmony::RunHarmony specifically designed compatibility RunSymphonyMap.

title: Run Harmony algorithm — RunHarmony2
code: RunHarmony2(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunHarmony2(   object,   group.by.vars,   assay = NULL,   reduction = "pca",   dims.use = 1:30,   project.dim = TRUE,   reduction.name = "Harmony",   reduction.save = NULL,   reduction.key = "Harmony_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run Harmony algorithm — RunHarmony2
text: object Seurat object. ... Additional arguments passed harmony::RunHarmony. group..vars batch variable name. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims.use dimensions used. Default 1:30. project.dim Whether project dimension reduction loadings. Default TRUE. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "Harmony". reduction.save Deprecated alias reduction.name, retained compatibility harmony::RunHarmony.Seurat. reduction.key prefix column names Harmony embeddings. Default "Harmony_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

what: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
text: function performs single-cell reference mapping using K-nearest neighbor (KNN) method. takes two single-cell datasets input: srt_query srt_ref. function maps cells srt_query dataset srt_ref dataset based similarity distance.

title: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
code: RunKNNMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = NULL,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   features = NULL,   nfeatures = 2000,   query_reduction = NULL,   ref_reduction = NULL,   query_dims = 1:30,   ref_dims = 1:30,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. features vector feature names include heatmap. provided, highly variable features (HVF) used. nfeatures maximum number features include heatmap. Default 2000. query_reduction character string specifying name dimensionality reduction query object use calculating distance metric. ref_reduction character string specifying name dimensionality reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. query_dims numeric vector specifying dimension indices query reduction used calculating distance metric. ref_dims numeric vector specifying dimension indices reference reduction used calculating distance metric. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

title: Single-cell reference mapping with KNN method — RunKNNMap
text: Seurat object projection results stored "ref.embeddings" reduction. ref_group provided, function also add new metadata column called "predicted_ref_group" query object.
