title: Run KNN prediction — RunKNNPredict
text: function performs KNN prediction annotate cell types based reference scRNA-seq bulk RNA-seq data.

title: Run KNN prediction — RunKNNPredict
code: RunKNNPredict(   srt_query,   srt_ref = NULL,   bulk_ref = NULL,   query_group = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = NULL,   query_reduction = NULL,   ref_reduction = NULL,   query_dims = 1:30,   ref_dims = 1:30,   query_collapsing = !is.null(query_group),   ref_collapsing = TRUE,   return_full_distance_matrix = FALSE,   features = NULL,   features_type = c("HVF", "DE"),   feature_source = "both",   nfeatures = 2000,   DEtest_param = list(max.cells.per.ident = 200, test.use = "wilcox"),   DE_threshold = "p_val_adj < 0.05",   nn_method = NULL,   distance_metric = "cosine",   k = 30,   filter_lowfreq = 0,   prefix = "KNNPredict" )

title: Run KNN prediction — RunKNNPredict
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref object class Seurat storing reference cells. bulk_ref cell atlas matrix, cell types represented columns genes represented rows. Either srt_ref bulk_ref must provided. query_group character vector specifying column name srt_query metadata represents cell grouping. ref_group character vector specifying column name srt_ref metadata represents cell grouping. query_assay character vector specifying assay used query data. Default default assay srt_query object. ref_assay character vector specifying assay used reference data. Default default assay srt_ref object. query_reduction character vector specifying dimensionality reduction method used query data. NULL, function use default reduction method specified srt_query object. ref_reduction character vector specifying dimensionality reduction method used reference data. NULL, function use default reduction method specified srt_ref object. query_dims numeric vector specifying dimensions used query data. Default first 30 dimensions. ref_dims numeric vector specifying dimensions used reference data. Default first 30 dimensions. query_collapsing boolean value indicating whether query data collapsed group-level average expression values. TRUE, function calculate average expression values group query data annotation performed separately group. Otherwise use raw expression values cell. ref_collapsing boolean value indicating whether reference data collapsed group-level average expression values. TRUE, function calculate average expression values group reference data annotation performed separately group. Otherwise use raw expression values cell. return_full_distance_matrix boolean value indicating whether full distance matrix returned. TRUE, function return distance matrix used KNN prediction, otherwise return annotated cell types. features character vector specifying features used KNN prediction. NULL, features query reference data used. features_type character vector specifying type features used KNN prediction. Must one "HVF" (highly variable features) "DE" (differentially expressed features). Default "HVF". feature_source source features used. Must one "", "query", "ref". Default "". nfeatures integer specifying maximum number features used KNN prediction. Default 2000. DEtest_param list parameters passed differential expression test function features_type set "DE". Default list(max.cells.per.ident = 200, test.use = "wilcox"). DE_threshold Threshold used filter DE features. using "roc" test, DE_threshold needs reassigned. e.g. "power > 0.5". Default "p_val < 0.05". nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. distance_metric character vector specifying distance metric used calculating similarity cells. Must one "cosine", "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming". Default "cosine". k number nearest neighbors considered KNN prediction. Default 30. filter_lowfreq integer specifying threshold filtering low-frequency cell types predicted results. Cell types frequency lower filter_lowfreq labelled "unreliable". Default 0, means filtering performed. prefix character vector specifying prefix added resulting annotations. Default "KNNPredict".

title: Run KNN prediction — RunKNNPredict
code: # Annotate cells using bulk RNA-seq data data(pancreas_sub) data(ref_scMCA) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:28:27] Start standard processing workflow... #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:28:28] Checking a list of <Seurat>... #> ! title: Compute LISI scores on a Seurat object — RunLISI
text: srt Seurat object. reductions Character vector dimensional reductions used compute LISI. NULL, DefaultReduction() used. reduction Deprecated alias reductions. dims Dimensions use reduction. Default NULL, uses available dimensions. label_colnames Character vector metadata columns used LISI. NULL, RunLISI() try use srt@misc[["integration_batch"]]. prefix Prefix used stored LISI metadata columns. NULL, reduction names used. tool_name Name used store detailed results srt@tools. Default "LISI" multiple reductions provided, otherwise paste0(prefix, "_LISI"). perplexity Effective neighborhood size. Default 30. nn_method Nearest-neighbor backend. One "auto" "exact". Default "auto", uses exact C++ backend thisutils. Requires accelerated thisutils::compute_lisi() interface exposes nn_method = c("auto", "exact"). tol Tolerance used binary search target perplexity. Default 1e-5. max_iter Maximum number binary-search iterations. Default 50. overwrite Whether overwrite existing metadata columns. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

NULL, reference variable features used. prediction_prefix Prefix added prediction metadata columns. k.weight Number neighbors used weighting transfer anchors. evaluate Whether compute mapping metrics truth label. truth_col Metadata column srt used truth label evaluate = TRUE. tool_name Name used store detailed results srt@tools. rare_threshold Maximum class proportion used define rare classes calculating rare_recall. scomm_python Optional Python binary used scOMM backend. NULL, SCOP_SCOMM_PYTHON consulted reticulate defaults used otherwise. scomm_hidden_nodes, scomm_epochs, scomm_batch_size, scomm_threshold, scomm_seed Parameters passed optional scOMM backend. verbose Whether print message. code: RunLargeVis(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunLargeVis(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   perplexity = 50,   n_neighbors = perplexity * 3,   n_components = 2,   metric = "euclidean",   n_epochs = -1,   learning_rate = 1,   scale = "maxabs",   init = "lvrandom",   init_sdev = NULL,   repulsion_strength = 7,   negative_sample_rate = 5,   nn_method = NULL,   n_trees = 50,   search_k = 2 * n_neighbors * n_trees,   n_threads = NULL,   n_sgd_threads = 0,   grain_size = 1,   kernel = "gauss",   pca = NULL,   pca_center = TRUE,   pcg_rand = TRUE,   fast_sgd = FALSE,   batch = FALSE,   opt_args = NULL,   epoch_callback = NULL,   pca_method = NULL,   reduction.name = "largevis",   reduction.key = "LargeVis_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunLargeVis(   object,   assay = NULL,   perplexity = 50,   n_neighbors = perplexity * 3,   n_components = 2,   metric = "euclidean",   n_epochs = -1,   learning_rate = 1,   scale = "maxabs",   init = "lvrandom",   init_sdev = NULL,   repulsion_strength = 7,   negative_sample_rate = 5,   nn_method = NULL,   n_trees = 50,   search_k = 2 * n_neighbors * n_trees,   n_threads = NULL,   n_sgd_threads = 0,   grain_size = 1,   kernel = "gauss",   pca = NULL,   pca_center = TRUE,   pcg_rand = TRUE,   fast_sgd = FALSE,   batch = FALSE,   opt_args = NULL,   epoch_callback = NULL,   pca_method = NULL,   reduction.key = "LargeVis_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )

title: Run LargeVis (Dimensionality Reduction with a LargeVis-like method) — RunLargeVis
text: object object. can Seurat object, matrix-like object, Neighbor object, Graph object. ... Additional arguments passed uwot::lvish. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. perplexity Controls size local neighborhood used manifold approximation. analogous n_neighbors umap. Change , rather n_neighbors. n_neighbors number neighbors use calculating perplexity. Usually set three times value perplexity. Must least large perplexity. n_components number LargeVis components. Default 2. metric Type distance metric use find nearest neighbors.  nn_method = "annoy" can one : "euclidean" (default) "cosine" "manhattan" "hamming" "correlation" (distance based Pearson correlation) "categorical" (see ) nn_method = "hnsw" can one : "euclidean" "cosine" "correlation" rnndescent installed nn_method = "nndescent" specified many metrics avaiable, including: "braycurtis" "canberra" "chebyshev" "dice" "hamming" "hellinger" "jaccard" "jensenshannon" "kulsinski" "rogerstanimoto" "russellrao" "sokalmichener" "sokalsneath" "spearmanr" "symmetrickl" "tsss" "yule" details see package documentation rnndescent. nn_method = "fnn", distance metric always "euclidean". X data frame matrix, multiple metrics can specified, passing list argument, name item list one metric names . value list item vector giving names integer ids columns included calculation, e.g. metric = list(euclidean = 1:4, manhattan = 5:10). metric calculation results separate fuzzy simplicial set, intersected together produce final set. Metric names can repeated. non-numeric columns removed data frame, safer use column names integer ids. Factor columns can also used specifying metric name "categorical". Factor columns treated different numeric columns although multiple factor columns can specified vector, factor column specified processed individually. specify non-factor column, coerced factor. given data block, may override pca pca_center arguments block, providing list one unnamed item containing column names ids, pca pca_center overrides named items, e.g. metric = list(euclidean = 1:4, manhattan = list(5:10, pca_center = FALSE)). exists allow mixed binary real-valued data included PCA applied , centering applied real-valued data (typical apply centering binary data PCA applied). n_epochs Number epochs use optimization embedded coordinates. default calculate number epochs dynamically based dataset size, give number edge samples LargeVis defaults. usually substantially larger UMAP defaults. n_epochs = 0, coordinates determined "init" returned. learning_rate Initial learning rate used optimization coordinates. scale Scaling apply X data frame matrix: "none" FALSE NULL scaling. "Z" "scale" TRUE Scale column   zero mean variance 1. "maxabs" Center column mean 0, divide   element maximum absolute value entire matrix. "range" Range scale entire matrix, smallest   element 0 largest 1. "colrange" Scale column range (0,1). lvish, default "maxabs", consistency LargeVis. init Type initialization coordinates. Options : "spectral" Spectral embedding using normalized Laplacian    fuzzy 1-skeleton, Gaussian noise added. "normlaplacian". title: Run MDS (multi-dimensional scaling) — RunMDS
text: Run MDS (multi-dimensional scaling)

title: Run MDS (multi-dimensional scaling) — RunMDS
code: RunMDS(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunMDS(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   features = NULL,   nmds = 50,   dist.method = "euclidean",   mds.method = "cmdscale",   rev.mds = FALSE,   reduction.name = "mds",   reduction.key = "MDS_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay' RunMDS(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   features = NULL,   nmds = 50,   dist.method = "euclidean",   mds.method = "cmdscale",   rev.mds = FALSE,   reduction.key = "MDS_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay5' RunMDS(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   features = NULL,   nmds = 50,   dist.method = "euclidean",   mds.method = "cmdscale",   rev.mds = FALSE,   reduction.key = "MDS_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunMDS(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   nmds = 50,   dist.method = "euclidean",   mds.method = "cmdscale",   rev.mds = FALSE,   reduction.key = "MDS_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run MDS (multi-dimensional scaling) — RunMDS
text: object object. can Seurat object, assay object, matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed stats::cmdscale, MASS::isoMDS MASS::sammon. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. features character vector features use. Default NULL. nmds number dimensions computed. Default 50. dist.method distance metric used. Currently supported values "euclidean", "chisquared", "kullback", "jeffreys", "jensen", "manhattan", "maximum", "canberra", "minkowski", "hamming". Default "euclidean". mds.method MDS algorithm used. Currently supported values "cmdscale", "isoMDS", "sammon". Default "cmdscale". rev.mds Whether perform reverse MDS (.e., transpose input matrix) running analysis. Default FALSE. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "mds". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "MDS_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run metabolism pathway scoring — RunMetabolism
code: RunMetabolism(   srt,   assay = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   layer = "counts",   db = c("KEGG", "REACTOME"),   species = "Homo_sapiens",   IDtype = "symbol",   db_update = FALSE,   db_version = "latest",   convert_species = TRUE,   Ensembl_version = NULL,   mirror = NULL,   method = c("AUCell", "GSVA", "ssGSEA", "VISION"),   backend = c("cpp", "r"),   cpp_strategy = c("sparse", "topk", "full"),   cpp_chunk_size = NULL,   minGSSize = 10,   maxGSSize = 500,   assay_name = "METABOLISM",   new_assay = TRUE,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run metabolism pathway scoring — RunMetabolism
text: srt Seurat object. assay Assay use expression matrix. Default DefaultAssay(srt). group.Name metadata column group cells . NULL, single-cell scoring. provided, expression averaged group scoring (cell-type level). layer Data layer use, usually "counts" count matrix. db Databases use metabolism pathways. One "KEGG", "REACTOME". species character vector specifying species gene annotation databases prepared. Can "Homo_sapiens" "Mus_musculus". IDtype character vector specifying type gene IDs srt object geneID argument. argument used convert gene IDs different type IDtype different result_IDtype. db_update Whether gene annotation databases forcefully updated. set FALSE, function attempt load cached databases instead. Default FALSE. db_version character vector specifying version gene annotation databases retrieved. Default "latest". convert_species Whether use species-converted database annotation missing specified species. Default TRUE. Ensembl_version integer specifying Ensembl version. Default NULL. NULL, latest version used. mirror Specify Ensembl mirror connect . valid options "www", "uswest", "useast", "asia". method Scoring method, one "AUCell", "GSVA", "ssGSEA", "VISION". backend Scoring backend. "cpp" default supported methods. "r" uses original R package implementation. "cpp" currently supports method = "AUCell", method = "GSVA", method = "ssGSEA". method = "VISION" falls back "r" backend explicitly set. AUCell C++ scores may differ R backend tied expression values randomly ranked. cpp_strategy C++ AUCell ranking strategy. "sparse" ranks non-zero genes approximates zero ties, "topk" ranks genes can contribute AUCell AUC, "full" ranks genes. cpp_chunk_size Optional cell chunk size C++ GSVA kernels. NULL "auto" automatically chunks large matrices reduce peak dense intermediate memory; positive values set chunk size manually. minGSSize minimum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. maxGSSize maximum size gene set considered enrichment analysis. assay_name Name assay store metabolism scores new_assay = TRUE. Default "METABOLISM". new_assay Whether create new assay metabolism scores group.= NULL. Default TRUE. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run metabolism pathway scoring — RunMetabolism
text: Returns Seurat object. group.= NULL, stores scores assay assay_name tools. group.provided, stores tools slot Metabolism_<group.>_<method> MetabolismPlot.

title: Run Monocle2 analysis — RunMonocle2
code: RunMonocle2(   srt,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   group.by = NULL,   expressionFamily = "negbinomial.size",   features = NULL,   feature_type = "HVF",   disp_filter = "mean_expression >= 0.1 & dispersion_empirical >= 1 * dispersion_fit",   max_components = 2,   reduction_method = "DDRTree",   norm_method = "log",   residualModelFormulaStr = NULL,   pseudo_expr = 1,   root_state = NULL,   xlab = NULL,   ylab = NULL,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run Monocle2 analysis — RunMonocle2
text: srt Seurat object. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default "counts". group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . expressionFamily distribution family use modeling gene expression. Default "negbinomial.size". features character vector features use. Defaults NULL, case features determined feature_type. feature_type type features use analysis. Possible values "HVF" highly variable features "Disp" features selected based dispersion. Default "HVF". disp_filter string specifying filter use feature_type "Disp". Default "mean_expression >= 0.1 & dispersion_empirical >= 1 * dispersion_fit". max_components maximum number dimensions use dimensionality reduction. Default 2. reduction_method dimensionality reduction method use. Possible values "DDRTree", "ICA", "tSNE", "SimplePPT", "L1-graph", "SGL-tree". Default "DDRTree". norm_method normalization method use. Possible values "log" "none". Default "log". residualModelFormulaStr model formula specifying effects subtract. Default NULL. pseudo_expr Amount increase expression values dimensionality reduction. Default 1. root_state state use root trajectory. NULL, prompt user input. xlab x-axis label plot. Default NULL. ylab y-axis label plot. Default NULL. seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run Monocle2 analysis — RunMonocle2
text: Seurat object Monocle2 analysis results added @tools slot.

title: Run Monocle2 analysis — RunMonocle2
code: if (interactive()) {   data(pancreas_sub)   pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub)   pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle2(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "SubCellType"   )   names(pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle2)   trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle2$trajectory    p1 <- CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle2_State",     reduction = "DDRTree",     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   )   p1    p1 + trajectory    FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle2_Pseudotime",     reduction = "UMAP",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   )    pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle2(     pancreas_sub,     feature_type = "Disp",     disp_filter = "mean_expression >= 0.01 & dispersion_empirical >= 1 * dispersion_fit"   )   trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle2$trajectory   p2 <- CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle2_State",     reduction = "DDRTree",     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   )   p2    p2 + trajectory    FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle2_Pseudotime",     reduction = "UMAP",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) }

title: Run Monocle3 analysis — RunMonocle3
code: if (interactive()) {   data(pancreas_sub)   pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub)   pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle3(     pancreas_sub,     reduction = "UMAP"   )    pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle3(     pancreas_sub,     reduction = "UMAP",     group.by = "CellType"   )   names(pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3)   trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$trajectory   milestones <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$milestones    CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_partitions",     reduction = "UMAP",     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) +     trajectory +     milestones   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_clusters",     reduction = "UMAP",     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) +     trajectory   FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle3_Pseudotime",     reduction = "UMAP",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) +     trajectory    if (FALSE) {     # Select the lineage using monocle3::choose_graph_segments     cds <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$cds     cds_sub <- thisutils::get_namespace_fun(       "monocle3", "choose_graph_segments"     )(       cds,       starting_pr_node = NULL,       ending_pr_nodes = NULL     )     pancreas_sub$Lineages_1 <- NA     pancreas_sub$Lineages_1[colnames(       cds_sub     )] <- pancreas_sub$Monocle3_Pseudotime[colnames(cds_sub)]     CellDimPlot(       pancreas_sub,       group.by = "SubCellType",       lineages = "Lineages_1",       lineages_span = 0.1,       theme_use = "theme_blank"     )   }    # Use Seurat clusters to infer the trajectories   pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub)   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = c("Standardclusters", "CellType"),     label = TRUE,     theme_use = "theme_blank"   )    pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle3(     pancreas_sub,     clusters = "Standardclusters"   )    trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$trajectory   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_partitions",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     label = TRUE, theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory    CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_clusters",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     label = TRUE, theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory   FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle3_Pseudotime",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory    # Use custom graphs and cell clusters to infer   # the partitions and trajectories, respectively   pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(     pancreas_sub,     cluster_resolution = 5   )   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = c("Standardclusters", "CellType"),     label = TRUE   )   pancreas_sub <- RunMonocle3(     pancreas_sub,     clusters = "Standardclusters",     graph = "Standardpca_SNN"   )   trajectory <- pancreas_sub@tools$Monocle3$trajectory   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_partitions",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     label = TRUE, theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory   CellDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     group.by = "Monocle3_clusters",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     label = TRUE, theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory   FeatureDimPlot(     pancreas_sub,     features = "Monocle3_Pseudotime",     reduction = "StandardUMAP2D",     theme_use = "theme_blank"   ) + trajectory }

title: Run MultiNicheNet analysis — RunMultiNichenetr
code: RunMultiNichenetr(   srt,   group.by,   sample.by,   condition.by,   condition_oi,   condition_reference,   receiver_celltypes,   sender_celltypes = NULL,   assay = NULL,   sample_agnostic = FALSE,   contrast_tbl = NULL,   batches = NULL,   covariates = NULL,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   lr_network = NULL,   ligand_target_matrix = NULL,   fraction_cutoff = 0.05,   min_cells = 10,   empirical_pval = TRUE,   top_n_interactions = 250,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run MultiNicheNet analysis — RunMultiNichenetr
text: srt Seurat object. group.Metadata column defining cell types. sample.Metadata column defining biological samples. condition.Metadata column defining conditions. condition_oi Condition interest. condition_reference Reference condition. receiver_celltypes Receiver cell types interest. sender_celltypes Sender cell types interest. Default available cell types. assay Assay use. sample_agnostic Whether use sample-agnostic MultiNicheNet wrapper. contrast_tbl Optional contrast table passed MultiNicheNet. NULL, simple contrast table created condition_oi condition_reference. batches Optional metadata column(s) used batches. covariates Optional metadata column(s) used covariates. species Species default NicheNet prior model loading. lr_network Optional ligand-receptor prior model path .rds file. ligand_target_matrix Optional ligand-target prior model path .rds file. fraction_cutoff Minimum expression fraction cutoff used MultiNicheNet. min_cells Minimum number cells per sample-celltype combination. empirical_pval Whether use empirical p-values. top_n_interactions Number top prioritized interactions kept standardized long table. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run NMF (non-negative matrix factorization) — RunNMF
code: RunNMF(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunNMF(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   features = NULL,   nbes = 50,   nmf.method = "RcppML",   tol = 1e-05,   maxit = 100,   rev.nmf = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.name = "nmf",   reduction.key = "BE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   cores = 0,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay' RunNMF(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   features = NULL,   nbes = 50,   nmf.method = "RcppML",   tol = 1e-05,   maxit = 100,   rev.nmf = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "BE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   cores = 0,   ... )  # S3 method for class 'Assay5' RunNMF(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   features = NULL,   nbes = 50,   nmf.method = "RcppML",   tol = 1e-05,   maxit = 100,   rev.nmf = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "BE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   cores = 0,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunNMF(   object,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   nbes = 50,   nmf.method = "RcppML",   tol = 1e-05,   maxit = 100,   rev.nmf = FALSE,   ndims.print = 1:5,   nfeatures.print = 30,   reduction.key = "BE_",   verbose = TRUE,   cores = 0,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run NMF (non-negative matrix factorization) — RunNMF
text: object object. can Seurat object, Assay object, matrix-like object. ... Additional arguments passed RcppML::nmf NMF::nmf. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. features character vector features use. Default NULL. nbes number basis vectors (components) computed. Default 50. nmf.method NMF algorithm used. Currently supported values "RcppML" "NMF". Default "RcppML". tol tolerance convergence (applicable nmf.method "RcppML"). Default 1e-5. maxit maximum number iterations convergence (applicable nmf.method "RcppML"). Default 100. rev.nmf Whether perform reverse NMF (.e., transpose input matrix) running analysis. Default FALSE. ndims.print dimensions (number basis vectors) print output. Default 1:5. nfeatures.print number features print output. Default 30. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "nmf". reduction.key prefix column names basis vectors. Default "BE_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. cores number threads used RcppML functions parallelized OpenMP. 0, number threads automatically determined RcppML::setRcppMLthreads(). Default 0.

title: Run NicheNet analysis — RunNichenetr
code: RunNichenetr(   srt,   group.by,   receiver,   sender = "all",   condition.by = NULL,   condition_oi = NULL,   condition_reference = NULL,   mode = c("aggregate", "aggregate_cluster_de", "custom"),   assay = NULL,   expression_pct = 0.1,   geneset = NULL,   background_expressed_genes = NULL,   top_n_ligands = 30,   top_n_targets = 200,   species = c("Homo_sapiens", "Mus_musculus"),   lr_network = NULL,   ligand_target_matrix = NULL,   weighted_networks = NULL,   cutoff_visualization = 0.33,   lfc_cutoff = 0.25,   use_sender_agnostic_background = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run NicheNet analysis — RunNichenetr
text: srt Seurat object. group.Metadata column defining cell types. receiver Receiver cell type(s). sender Sender cell type(s). Use "" use non-receiver cell types. condition.Metadata column defining conditions. condition_oi Condition interest. condition_reference Reference condition. mode NicheNet wrapper mode. Supported values "aggregate", "aggregate_cluster_de", "custom". assay Assay use. expression_pct Minimum fraction cells expressing gene. geneset Optional target gene set mode = "custom". background_expressed_genes Optional background genes mode = "custom". top_n_ligands Number top ligands keep standardized summaries. top_n_targets Number top targets per ligand keep standardized summaries. species Species default NicheNet prior model loading. lr_network Optional ligand-receptor prior model path .rds file. ligand_target_matrix Optional ligand-target prior model path .rds file. weighted_networks Optional weighted network list path .rds file. cutoff_visualization Cutoff passed nichenetr::prepare_ligand_target_visualization(). lfc_cutoff Log fold change cutoff DE analysis "aggregate" "aggregate_cluster_de" modes. Default 0.25. use_sender_agnostic_background Whether use sender cell types sender = "". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run NicheNet analysis — RunNichenetr
text: Seurat object standardized NicheNet results stored srt@tools[["Nichenetr"]].

title: Run PAGA analysis — RunPAGA
text: PAGA graph-based method used infer cellular trajectories. function runs PAGA analysis Seurat object.

title: Run PAGA analysis — RunPAGA
code: RunPAGA(   srt = NULL,   adata = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   group.by = NULL,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   use_rna_velocity = FALSE,   vkey = "stochastic",   embedded_with_PAGA = FALSE,   paga_layout = "fr",   threshold = 0.1,   point_size = 20,   infer_pseudotime = FALSE,   root_group = NULL,   root_cell = NULL,   n_dcs = 10,   n_branchings = 0,   min_group_size = 0.01,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   legend.position = "on data",   cores = 1,   show_plot = FALSE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "paga",   dirpath = "./paga",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run PAGA analysis — RunPAGA
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. adata anndata object. Default NULL. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. use_rna_velocity Whether use RNA velocity PAGA analysis. Default FALSE. vkey name RNA velocity data use use_rna_velocity TRUE. Default "stochastic". embedded_with_PAGA Whether embed data using PAGA layout. Default FALSE. paga_layout layout plotting PAGA graph. See layout param scanpy.pl.paga function. threshold threshold plotting PAGA graph. Edges weights threshold drawn. point_size point size plotting. infer_pseudotime Whether infer pseudotime. root_group group use root pseudotime inference. root_cell cell use root pseudotime inference. n_dcs number diffusion components use pseudotime inference. n_branchings Number branchings detect. min_group_size minimum size group (fraction total number cells) consider potential branching point. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". cores number cores use cellrank. show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run PAGA analysis — RunPAGA
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunPAGA(   pancreas_sub,   assay_x = "RNA",   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP" ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   reduction = "draw_graph_fr" )  PAGAPlot(pancreas_sub, reduction = "UMAP")  CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   reduction = "UMAP",   paga = pancreas_sub@misc$paga )  pancreas_sub <- RunPAGA(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP",   embedded_with_PAGA = TRUE,   infer_pseudotime = TRUE,   root_group = "Ductal" )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   features = "dpt_pseudotime",   reduction = "PAGAUMAP2D" )  PAGAPlot(pancreas_sub, reduction = "PAGAUMAP2D")  CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   reduction = "PAGAUMAP2D",   paga = pancreas_sub@misc$paga ) } # }

what: Single-cell reference mapping with PCA method — RunPCAMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with PCA method — RunPCAMap
text: Single-cell reference mapping PCA method

title: Single-cell reference mapping with PCA method — RunPCAMap
code: RunPCAMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = srt_ref[[ref_pca]]@assay.used,   ref_pca = NULL,   ref_dims = 1:30,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with PCA method — RunPCAMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_pca character string specifying name PCA reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. NULL (default), automatically detected first PCA reduction. ref_dims numeric vector specifying dimension indices reference reduction used calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

text: Run PHATE (Potential Heat-diffusion Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding)

title: Run PHATE (Potential of Heat-diffusion for Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding) — RunPHATE
code: RunPHATE(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunPHATE(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   n_components = 2,   knn = 5,   decay = 40,   n_landmark = 2000,   t = "auto",   gamma = 1,   n_pca = 100,   knn_dist = "euclidean",   knn_max = NULL,   t_max = 100,   do_cluster = FALSE,   n_clusters = "auto",   max_clusters = 100,   reduction.name = "phate",   reduction.key = "PHATE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunPHATE(   object,   assay = NULL,   n_components = 2,   knn = 5,   decay = 40,   n_landmark = 2000,   t = "auto",   gamma = 1,   n_pca = 100,   knn_dist = "euclidean",   knn_max = NULL,   t_max = 100,   do_cluster = FALSE,   n_clusters = "auto",   max_clusters = 100,   reduction.key = "PHATE_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11,   ... )

title: Run PHATE (Potential of Heat-diffusion for Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding) — RunPHATE
text: object object. can Seurat object, matrix-like object, Neighbor object, Graph object. ... Additional arguments passed phate.PHATE. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. n_components number PHATE components. Default 2. knn number nearest neighbors build kernel. Default 5. decay sets decay rate kernel tails. Default 40. n_landmark number landmarks use fast PHATE. Default 2000. t power diffusion operator powered. sets level diffusion. "auto", t selected according knee point Von Neumann Entropy diffusion operator. Default "auto". gamma informational distance constant -1 1. gamma=1 gives PHATE log potential, gamma=0 gives square root potential. Default 1. n_pca number principal components use calculating neighborhoods. extremely large datasets, using n_pca < 20 allows neighborhoods calculated roughly log(n_samples) time. Default 100. knn_dist distance metric k-nearest neighbors. Recommended values: "euclidean", "cosine", "precomputed". Default "euclidean". knn_max maximum number neighbors alpha decaying kernel computed point. large datasets, setting knn_max small multiple knn can speed computation significantly. Default NULL. t_max maximum t test. Default 100. do_cluster Whether perform clustering PHATE embeddings. Default FALSE. n_clusters number clusters identified. Default "auto". max_clusters maximum number clusters test. Default 100. reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "phate". reduction.key prefix column names PHATE embeddings. Default "PHATE_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run PHATE (Potential of Heat-diffusion for Affinity-based Trajectory Embedding) — RunPHATE
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunPHATE(   object = pancreas_sub,   features = SeuratObject::VariableFeatures(pancreas_sub) ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   reduction = "phate" ) } # }

what: Run PaCMAP (Pairwise Controlled Manifold Approximation) — RunPaCMAP
title: Run PaCMAP (Pairwise Controlled Manifold Approximation) — RunPaCMAP
text: Run PaCMAP (Pairwise Controlled Manifold Approximation)

title: Run PaCMAP (Pairwise Controlled Manifold Approximation) — RunPaCMAP
code: RunPaCMAP(object, ...)  # S3 method for class 'Seurat' RunPaCMAP(   object,   reduction = "pca",   dims = NULL,   features = NULL,   assay = NULL,   layer = "data",   n_components = 2,   n.neighbors = NULL,   MN_ratio = 0.5,   FP_ratio = 2,   distance_method = "euclidean",   lr = 1,   num_iters = 450L,   apply_pca = TRUE,   init = "random",   reduction.name = "pacmap",   reduction.key = "PaCMAP_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )  # Default S3 method RunPaCMAP(   object,   assay = NULL,   n_components = 2,   n.neighbors = NULL,   MN_ratio = 0.5,   FP_ratio = 2,   distance_method = "euclidean",   lr = 1,   num_iters = 450L,   apply_pca = TRUE,   init = "random",   reduction.key = "PaCMAP_",   verbose = TRUE,   seed.use = 11L,   ... )

title: Run PaCMAP (Pairwise Controlled Manifold Approximation) — RunPaCMAP
text: object object. can Seurat object, matrix-like object, Neighbor object, Graph object. ... Additional arguments passed pacmap.PaCMAP. reduction dimensionality reduction use. Default "pca". dims dimensions used. Default NULL. features character vector features use. Default NULL. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer layer use. Default data. n_components number PaCMAP components. Default 2. n.neighbors number neighbors considered k-Nearest Neighbor graph. Default 10 dataset whose sample size smaller 10000. large dataset whose sample size (n) larger 10000, default value : 10 + 15 * (log10(n) - 4). MN_ratio ratio ratio number mid-near pairs number neighbors. Default 0.5. FP_ratio ratio ratio number pairs number neighbors. Default 2. distance_method distance metric used. Default "euclidean". lr learning rate AdaGrad optimizer. Default 1. num_iters number iterations PaCMAP optimization. Default 450. apply_pca Whether pacmap apply PCA data constructing k-Nearest Neighbor graph. Using PCA preprocess data can largely accelerate DR process without losing much accuracy. Notice option affect initialization optimization process. Default TRUE. init initialization lower dimensional embedding. One "pca" "random". Default "random". reduction.name name reduction stored Seurat object. Default "pacmap". reduction.key prefix column names PaCMAP embeddings. Default "PaCMAP_". verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. seed.use Random seed reproducibility. Default 11.

title: Run PaCMAP (Pairwise Controlled Manifold Approximation) — RunPaCMAP
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunPaCMAP(   object = pancreas_sub,   features = SeuratObject::VariableFeatures(pancreas_sub) ) CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   reduction = "pacmap" ) } # }

title: Run Palantir analysis — RunPalantir
text: Run Palantir analysis

title: Run Palantir analysis — RunPalantir
code: RunPalantir(   srt = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   adata = NULL,   group.by = NULL,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   dm_n_components = 10,   dm_alpha = 0,   dm_n_eigs = NULL,   early_group = NULL,   early_cell = NULL,   terminal_cells = NULL,   terminal_groups = NULL,   num_waypoints = 1200,   scale_components = TRUE,   use_early_cell_as_start = TRUE,   adjust_early_cell = FALSE,   adjust_terminal_cells = FALSE,   max_iterations = 25,   cores = 1,   point_size = 20,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   legend.position = "on data",   show_plot = FALSE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "palantir",   dirpath = "./",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run Palantir analysis — RunPalantir
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". adata anndata object. Default NULL. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. dm_n_components number diffusion components calculate. dm_alpha Normalization parameter diffusion operator. dm_n_eigs Number eigen vectors use. early_group Name group start Palantir analysis . early_cell Name cell start Palantir analysis . terminal_cells Character vector specifying terminal cells Palantir analysis. terminal_groups Character vector specifying terminal groups Palantir analysis. num_waypoints Number waypoints included. scale_components cell fate probabilities scaled component independently? use_early_cell_as_start starting cell terminal group set early_cell? adjust_early_cell Whether adjust early cell cell minimum pseudotime value. adjust_terminal_cells Whether adjust terminal cells cells maximum pseudotime value terminal group. max_iterations Maximum number iterations pseudotime convergence. cores number cores use cellrank. point_size point size plotting. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run Palantir analysis — RunPalantir
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunPalantir(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP",   early_group = "Ductal",   terminal_groups = c("Alpha", "Beta", "Delta", "Epsilon") )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   c("palantir_pseudotime", "palantir_diff_potential") )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   paste0(     c("Alpha", "Beta", "Delta", "Epsilon"),     "_diff_potential"   ) ) } # }

title: Permutation-based proportion test — RunPermutation
text: Method-specific implementation used RunProportionTest proportion_method = "permutation". method permutation-based statistical test compositional shift rather dedicated biological model. Bootstrap confidence intervals reported uncertainty estimates observed log2 fold-differences.

title: Permutation-based proportion test — RunPermutation
code: RunPermutation(   srt,   group.by,   split.by,   comparison = NULL,   n_permutations = 1000,   include_all_cells = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Permutation-based proportion test — RunPermutation
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . split.Metadata column identifies condition groups compare. sample-level methods, split.omitted sample.provided, sample.treated condition column virtual samples created within condition. comparison Optional: specify comparisons perform. n_permutations Number permutations permutation-based test. include_all_cells Whether include cell types complete grid permutation mode. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Permutation-based proportion test — RunPermutation
text: method result bundle used internally RunProportionTest.

title: Propeller differential abundance wrapper — RunPropeller
text: Method-specific implementation used RunProportionTest proportion_method = "propeller". implementation works sample-level proportions using propeller-style transformed test stores standardized outputs plotting.

title: Propeller differential abundance wrapper — RunPropeller
code: RunPropeller(   srt,   group.by,   split.by,   sample.by,   comparison = NULL,   n_bootstrap = 1000,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Propeller differential abundance wrapper — RunPropeller
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . split.Metadata column identifies condition groups compare. sample-level methods, split.omitted sample.provided, sample.treated condition column virtual samples created within condition. sample.Metadata column identifies biological samples. "milo", "sccoda", "propeller", sample.omitted identical split., virtual samples created within split.group convenience. comparison Optional: specify comparisons perform. n_bootstrap Number bootstrap iterations confidence intervals. seed Random seed. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Propeller differential abundance wrapper — RunPropeller
text: method result bundle used internally RunProportionTest.

title: Proportion Test — RunProportionTest
text: RunProportionTest performs differential abundance testing cell proportions. function acts dispatcher routes one method-specific implementations: permutation, milo, sccoda, propeller.

title: Proportion Test — RunProportionTest
code: RunProportionTest(   srt,   group.by,   split.by = NULL,   comparison = NULL,   proportion_method,   sample.by = NULL,   pseudo_sample_n = 3L,   n_permutations = 1000,   FDR_threshold = 0.05,   log2FD_threshold = log2(1.5),   include_all_cells = FALSE,   seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Proportion Test — RunProportionTest
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . split.Metadata column identifies condition groups compare. sample-level methods, split.omitted sample.provided, sample.treated condition column virtual samples created within condition. comparison Optional: specify comparisons perform. proportion_method Differential abundance method. One "permutation", "milo", "sccoda", "propeller". argument required. Alias values "permutation_test" "perm" accepted normalized "permutation". sample.Metadata column identifies biological samples. "milo", "sccoda", "propeller", sample.omitted identical split., virtual samples created within split.group convenience. pseudo_sample_n Number virtual samples per split.group sample-level method usable sample.. n_permutations Number permutations permutation-based test. FDR_threshold FDR value cutoff significance. log2FD_threshold Absolute value log2FD cutoff significance. include_all_cells Whether include cell types complete grid permutation mode. seed Random seed. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE. ... Additional arguments passed selected method function.

title: Proportion Test — RunProportionTest
text: Miller et al. paper, scProportionTest, miloR, scCODA, propeller/speckle

title: Proportion Test — RunProportionTest
code: data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunProportionTest(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "CellType",   split.by = "Phase",   proportion_method = "permutation",   comparison = list(c("G2M", "G1")) ) #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:35:36] Start proportion test ("permutation") #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:35:36] Running comparison: "G1" vs "G2M" #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:35:36] Running comparison: "G2M" vs "G1" #> ✔ [2026-05-14 07:35:36] Proportion test completed ("permutation")  ProportionTestPlot(   pancreas_sub )

what: Map query cells into a reference space — RunReferenceMapping
title: Map query cells into a reference space — RunReferenceMapping
text: Reference mapping workflow modeled Seurat's MapQuery pattern. current implementation computes gene activity ATAC query cells, finds anchors RNA reference, integrates query reference embedding space, transfers labels, projects query cells reference UMAP.

title: Map query cells into a reference space — RunReferenceMapping
code: RunReferenceMapping(   srt,   reference,   assay = NULL,   prefix = "ATAC",   reference_assay = NULL,   reference_reduction = "pca",   ref_umap = NULL,   reference_dims = 1:30,   reference_label = NULL,   label_method = c("Seurat", "scOMM"),   add_gene_activity = TRUE,   gene_activity_assay = "ACTIVITY",   dims = 2:30,   features = NULL,   reduction_project_method = "pcaproject",   k.anchor = 5,   k.filter = 200,   k.score = 30,   k.weight = 100,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean",   evaluate = FALSE,   truth_col = NULL,   tool_name = NULL,   rare_threshold = 0.05,   scomm_python = NULL,   scomm_hidden_nodes = c(128, 64),   scomm_epochs = 10,   scomm_batch_size = 32,   scomm_threshold = 0.5,   scomm_seed = 11,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Map query cells into a reference space — RunReferenceMapping
text: srt Seurat object. reference RNA reference Seurat object used mapping. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. prefix Prefix used resolve ATAC reductions. Default "ATAC". reference_assay Assay used reference object. reference_reduction Reduction used reference object. ref_umap UMAP reduction RNA reference used query projection. reference_dims Dimensions used reference reduction. reference_label Metadata column reference used transfer labels. label_method Label-transfer backend used anchor mapping. One "Seurat" "scOMM". add_gene_activity Whether calculate gene activity assay query. gene_activity_assay Name gene activity assay used mapping. dims Query reduction dimensions used TransferData. features Features used FindTransferAnchors. NULL, reference variable features used. reduction_project_method Anchor projection method. Default "pcaproject" RNA reference mapping. k.anchor, k.filter, k.score, k.weight Parameters passed Seurat anchor finding/integration. projection_method, nn_method, k, distance_metric, vote_fun Passed RunKNNMap UMAP projection neighbor voting. evaluate Whether compute mapping metrics truth label. truth_col Metadata column srt used truth label evaluate = TRUE. tool_name Name used store detailed results srt@tools. rare_threshold Maximum class proportion used define rare classes calculating rare_recall. scomm_python Optional Python binary used scOMM backend. NULL, SCOP_SCOMM_PYTHON consulted reticulate defaults used otherwise. scomm_hidden_nodes, scomm_epochs, scomm_batch_size, scomm_threshold, scomm_seed Parameters passed optional scOMM backend. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Map query cells into a reference space — RunReferenceMapping

code: RunSCExplorer(   base_dir = "SCExplorer",   data_file = "data.hdf5",   meta_file = "meta.hdf5",   title = "SCExplorer",   initial_dataset = NULL,   initial_reduction = NULL,   initial_group = NULL,   initial_feature = NULL,   initial_assay = NULL,   initial_slot = NULL,   initial_label = FALSE,   initial_cell_palette = "Chinese",   initial_feature_palette = "Spectral",   initial_theme = "theme_scop",   initial_size = 4,   initial_ncol = 3,   initial_arrange = NULL,   initial_raster = NULL,   create_script = TRUE,   style_script = TRUE,   overwrite = TRUE,   return_app = TRUE )

title: Run SCExplorer — RunSCExplorer
text: base_dir base directory SCExplorer app. Default "SCExplorer". data_file name HDF5 file stores data matrices dataset. Default "data.hdf5". meta_file name HDF5 file stores metadata dataset. Default "meta.hdf5". title title SCExplorer app. Default "SCExplorer". initial_dataset initial dataset loaded app. Default NULL. initial_reduction initial dimensional reduction method loaded app. Default NULL. initial_group initial variable group cells app. Default NULL. initial_feature initial feature loaded app. Default NULL. initial_assay initial assay loaded app. Default NULL. initial_slot initial layer loaded app. Default NULL. initial_label Whether add labels initial plot. Default FALSE. initial_cell_palette initial color palette cells. Default "Chinese". initial_feature_palette initial color palette features. Default "Spectral". initial_theme initial theme plots. Default "theme_scop". initial_size initial size plots. Default 4. initial_ncol initial number columns arranging plots. Default 3. initial_arrange Whether use "Row" initial arrangement. Default TRUE. initial_raster Whether perform rasterization initial plot. default, set automatic, meaning TRUE number cells initial datasets exceeds 100,000. Default NULL. create_script Whether create SCExplorer app script. Default TRUE. style_script Whether style SCExplorer app script. Default TRUE. overwrite Whether overwrite existing data data file. Default TRUE. return_app Whether return SCExplorer app. Default TRUE.

title: Run scVelo workflow — RunSCVELO
text: scVelo scalable toolkit RNA velocity analysis single cells. function runs enhanced scVelo workflow Seurat object improved error handling, version compatibility, modular design.

title: Run scVelo workflow — RunSCVELO
code: RunSCVELO(   srt = NULL,   adata = NULL,   assay_x = "RNA",   layer_x = "counts",   assay_y = c("spliced", "unspliced"),   layer_y = "counts",   group.by = NULL,   linear_reduction = NULL,   nonlinear_reduction = NULL,   basis = NULL,   mode = "stochastic",   fitting_by = "stochastic",   magic_impute = FALSE,   knn = 5,   t = 2,   min_shared_counts = 30,   n_pcs = 30,   n_neighbors = 30,   filter_genes = TRUE,   min_counts = 3,   min_counts_u = 3,   normalize_per_cell = TRUE,   log_transform = TRUE,   use_raw = FALSE,   diff_kinetics = FALSE,   stream_smooth = NULL,   stream_density = 2,   arrow_length = 5,   arrow_size = 5,   arrow_density = 0.5,   denoise = FALSE,   denoise_topn = 3,   kinetics = FALSE,   kinetics_topn = 100,   calculate_velocity_genes = FALSE,   compute_velocity_confidence = TRUE,   compute_terminal_states = TRUE,   compute_pseudotime = TRUE,   compute_paga = TRUE,   top_n = 6,   cores = 1,   palette = "Chinese",   palcolor = NULL,   legend.position = "on data",   show_plot = TRUE,   save_plot = FALSE,   plot_format = c("pdf", "png", "svg"),   plot_dpi = 300,   plot_prefix = "scvelo",   dirpath = "./scvelo",   return_seurat = !is.null(srt),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run scVelo workflow — RunSCVELO
text: srt Seurat object. Default NULL. provided, adata ignored. adata anndata object. Default NULL. assay_x Assay convert main data matrix anndata object. Default "RNA". layer_x Layer name assay_x Seurat object. Default "counts". assay_y Assays convert layers anndata object. Default c("spliced", "unspliced"). layer_y Layer names assay_y Seurat object. Default "counts". group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . linear_reduction linear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "pca", "svd", "ica", "nmf", "mds", "glmpca". Default "pca". nonlinear_reduction nonlinear dimensionality reduction method use. Options "umap", "umap-naive", "tsne", "dm", "phate", "pacmap", "trimap", "largevis", "fr". Default "umap". basis basis use reduction, e.g., "UMAP". mode Velocity estimation models use. Can "deterministic", "stochastic", "dynamical". fitting_by Method used fit gene velocities dynamical modeling. Default "stochastic". magic_impute Flag indicating whether perform magic imputation. Default FALSE. knn number nearest neighbors magic.MAGIC. Default 5. t Power diffusion operator powered magic.MAGIC. Default 2. min_shared_counts Minimum number counts (unspliced spliced) required gene. Default 30. n_pcs Number principal components use linear reduction. Default 30. n_neighbors Number neighbors use constructing KNN graph. Default 30. filter_genes Whether filter genes based minimum counts. min_counts Minimum counts gene filtering. min_counts_u Minimum unspliced counts gene filtering. normalize_per_cell Whether normalize counts per cell. log_transform Whether apply log transformation. use_raw Whether use raw data dynamical modeling. diff_kinetics Whether use differential kinetics. stream_smooth Multiplication factor scale Gaussian kernel around grid point. stream_density Controls closeness streamlines. density = 2 (default), domain divided 60x60 grid, whereas density linearly scales grid. cell grid can , , one traversing streamline. Default 2. arrow_length Length arrows. arrow_size Size arrows. Default 5. arrow_density Amount velocities show. denoise Boolean flag indicating whether denoise. denoise_topn Number genes highest likelihood selected infer velocity directions. kinetics Boolean flag indicating whether estimate RNA kinetics. kinetics_topn Number genes highest likelihood selected infer velocity directions. calculate_velocity_genes Boolean flag indicating whether calculate velocity genes. compute_velocity_confidence Whether compute velocity confidence metrics. compute_terminal_states Whether compute terminal states (root end points). compute_pseudotime Whether compute velocity pseudotime. compute_paga Whether compute PAGA (Partition-based graph abstraction). top_n number top features plot. cores number cores use cellrank. palette Color palette name. Available palettes can found thisplot::show_palettes. Default "Chinese". palcolor Custom colors used create color palette. Default NULL. legend.position Position legend plots. Can "data", "right margin", "bottom right", etc. Default "data". show_plot Whether show plot. Default FALSE. save_plot Whether save plots files. Default FALSE. plot_format Format saved plots: "png" (default), "pdf", "svg". plot_dpi Resolution (DPI) saved plots. Default 300. plot_prefix Prefix saved plot filenames. Default "cellrank". dirpath directory save plots. Default "./cellrank". return_seurat Whether return Seurat object instead anndata object. Default TRUE. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run scVelo workflow — RunSCVELO
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunSCVELO(   pancreas_sub,   assay_x = "RNA",   group.by = "SubCellType",   linear_reduction = "PCA",   nonlinear_reduction = "UMAP" )  FeatureDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   c(     "stochastic_length",     "stochastic_confidence",     "stochastic_pseudotime"   ) )  VelocityPlot(   pancreas_sub,   reduction = "UMAP",   plot_type = "stream" )  CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = "SubCellType",   reduction = "UMAP",   pt.size = NA,   velocity = "stochastic" ) } # }

what: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
text: Run scTenifoldKnk -silico knockout analysis

title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
code: RunscTenifoldKnk(   srt,   gKO,   assay = NULL,   layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   qc = TRUE,   qc_mt_threshold = 0.1,   qc_min_library_size = 1000,   qc_min_cells = 25,   nc_lambda = 0,   nc_nNet = 10,   nc_nCells = 500,   nc_nComp = 3,   nc_scaleScores = TRUE,   nc_symmetric = FALSE,   nc_q = 0.9,   td_K = 3,   td_maxIter = 1000,   td_maxError = 1e-05,   td_nDecimal = 3,   ma_nDim = 2,   cores = 1,   backend = c("cpp", "scTenifoldKnk"),   store_networks = TRUE,   store_manifold = TRUE,   tool_name = "scTenifoldKnk",   verbose = TRUE )

title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
text: srt Seurat object. gKO Gene symbol symbols knock . genes must present optional feature QC filtering. assay assay use. NULL, default assay Seurat object used. object also contains ChromatinAssay, default assay additional ChromatinAssay preprocessed sequentially. layer Assay layer used count matrix. features Optional genes retain running network construction. supplied, gKO always retained present input assay. qc Whether apply scTenifoldKnk-style quality control. qc_mt_threshold Maximum mitochondrial read fraction per cell. qc_min_library_size Minimum library size per cell. qc_min_cells Minimum number expressing cells required per gene. nc_lambda, nc_nNet, nc_nCells, nc_nComp, nc_scaleScores, nc_symmetric, nc_q Network construction parameters forwarded scTenifoldNet::makeNetworks(). td_K, td_maxIter, td_maxError, td_nDecimal Tensor decomposition parameters forwarded scTenifoldNet::tensorDecomposition(). ma_nDim Manifold-alignment dimension forwarded scTenifoldNet::manifoldAlignment(). cores Number cores used native network-construction workers forwarded downstream linear algebra applicable. backend cpp native equivalent covariance-based network construction, direct sparse network assembly, controlled per-gene eigensolver parallelism, helpers tensor decomposition, manifold matrix construction, directionality, distance calculation. scTenifoldKnk calls scTenifoldKnk::scTenifoldKnk() directly comparison. store_networks Whether keep WT/KO tensor networks srt@tools. store_manifold Whether keep manifold-alignment coordinates srt@tools. tool_name Name srt@tools entry. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
text: Seurat object scTenifoldKnk results stored srt@tools[[tool_name]].

title: Run scTenifoldKnk in-silico knockout analysis — RunscTenifoldKnk
code: data(pancreas_sub) gene_use <- "Pdx1" counts <- GetAssayData5(pancreas_sub, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts") detected <- names(sort(Matrix::rowSums(counts > 0), decreasing = TRUE)) features_use <- unique(c(gene_use, head(detected, 300)))  pancreas_sub <- RunscTenifoldKnk(   pancreas_sub,   gKO = gene_use,   features = features_use,   qc = FALSE,   nc_nNet = 3,   nc_nCells = 200,   td_maxIter = 200,   store_networks = FALSE,   store_manifold = TRUE ) #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:22] Run scTenifoldKnk knockout for "Pdx1" using "cpp" backend #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:27] Construct scTenifoldNet network ensemble #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:27] Denoise network ensemble with tensor decomposition #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:27] Denoise network ensemble with tensor decomposition  ■■ … #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:27] Align WT and KO network manifolds #> ✔ [2026-05-14 07:37:27] scTenifoldKnk results stored in `srt@tools[[scTenifoldKnk]]`  dr <- pancreas_sub@tools$scTenifoldKnk$diffRegulation head(dr) #>     gene     distance        Z          FC      p.value        p.adj #> 1   Pdx1 9.304567e-04 4.568187 12059.91897 0.000000e+00 0.000000e+00 #> 2   Gnas 4.887597e-05 2.057742    33.27690 7.992633e-09 1.202891e-06 #> 3   Ssr2 4.386627e-05 1.985077    26.80486 2.250708e-07 2.258210e-05 #> 4   Ssr4 4.132486e-05 1.945477    23.78893 1.074990e-06 8.089300e-05 #> 5 Sec61b 4.074745e-05 1.936192    23.12879 1.515051e-06 9.120607e-05 #> 6   Dad1 3.408756e-05 1.820118    16.18616 5.741213e-05 2.880175e-03  scTenifoldKnkPlot(pancreas_sub, plot_type = "effect")

what: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
title: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
text: Run native scop implementation core SciBet classifier using labeled reference Seurat object.

title: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
code: RunSciBet(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   ref_group,   query_group = NULL,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_assay = NULL,   query_layer = "counts",   ref_layer = "counts",   features = NULL,   nfeatures = 1000,   additional_features_per_class = 0,   input_transform = c("auto", "none", "expm1"),   prefix = "scibet",   store_model = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref object class Seurat storing reference cells. ref_group character vector specifying column name srt_ref metadata represents cell grouping. query_group character vector specifying column name srt_query metadata represents cell grouping. query_assay character vector specifying assay used query data. Default default assay srt_query object. ref_assay character vector specifying assay used reference data. Default default assay srt_ref object. query_layer, ref_layer Assay layers used query reference. features Candidate features used SciBet. NULL, common genes query reference used. nfeatures Number entropy-test features selected features. additional_features_per_class Additional high-expression features selected per reference class. input_transform transform extracted values SciBet's internal log1p step. "auto" applies expm1 "data" layers transform otherwise. prefix Prefix metadata columns. store_model Whether store SciBet core probabilities srt_query@tools. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
text: Seurat object SciBet annotations metadata results srt_query@tools[["SciBet"]].

title: Annotate single cells using native SciBet — RunSciBet
code: data(panc8_sub) genenames <- make.unique(   thisutils::capitalize(     rownames(panc8_sub),     force_tolower = TRUE   ) ) names(genenames) <- rownames(panc8_sub) panc8_sub <- RenameFeatures(   panc8_sub,   newnames = genenames ) #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:29] Rename features for the assay: RNA  data(pancreas_sub) pancreas_sub <- RunSciBet(   srt_query = pancreas_sub,   srt_ref = panc8_sub,   ref_group = "celltype",   nfeatures = 200 ) #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:30] Run native SciBet with 12928 candidate features and 13 reference classes #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:32] SciBet annotations stored in metadata column "scibet_annotation" pancreas_sub <- standard_scop(pancreas_sub, verbose = FALSE) #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:37] Skip `log1p()` because `layer = data` is not "counts" CellDimPlot(   pancreas_sub,   group.by = c("SubCellType", "scibet_annotation"),   xlab = "UMAP_1",   ylab = "UMAP_2" )   ht <- CellCorHeatmap(   srt_query = pancreas_sub,   srt_ref = pancreas_sub,   query_group = "scibet_annotation",   ref_group = "SubCellType",   width = 3,   height = 3 ) #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:50] Use the HVF to calculate distance metric #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:50] Use [1] 2000 features to calculate distance. #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:50] Detected query data type: "log_normalized_counts" #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:50] Detected reference data type: "log_normalized_counts" #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:50] Calculate similarity... #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:50] Use raw method to find neighbors #> ℹ [2026-05-14 07:37:50] Predict cell type...  ht$plot

what: Single-cell reference mapping with Seurat method — RunSeuratMap
title: Single-cell reference mapping with Seurat method — RunSeuratMap
text: Single-cell reference mapping Seurat method

title: Single-cell reference mapping with Seurat method — RunSeuratMap
code: RunSeuratMap(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_assay = NULL,   ref_pca = NULL,   ref_assay = srt_ref[[ref_pca]]@assay.used,   ref_dims = 1:30,   ref_umap = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   normalization.method = "LogNormalize",   reduction_project_method = "pcaproject",   k.anchor = 5,   k.filter = 200,   k.score = 30,   k.weight = 100,   projection_method = c("model", "knn"),   nn_method = NULL,   k = 30,   distance_metric = "cosine",   vote_fun = "mean" )

title: Single-cell reference mapping with Seurat method — RunSeuratMap
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref Seurat object count matrix representing reference object. provided, similarities calculated cells query reference objects. provided, similarities calculated within query object. query_assay assay use query object. provided, default assay query object used. ref_pca character string specifying name PCA reduction reference object use calculating distance metric. ref_assay assay use reference object. provided, default assay reference object used. ref_dims numeric vector specifying dimension indices reference reduction used calculating distance metric. ref_umap character string specifying name UMAP reduction reference object. provided, first UMAP reduction found reference object used. ref_group grouping variable reference object. variable used group cells heatmap columns. provided, cells treated one group. normalization.method normalization method use. Default `"LogNormalize"`. reduction_project_method Dimensional reduction perform finding anchors. Default `"pcaproject"`. k.anchor many neighbors (k) use finding anchors. Default `5`. k.filter many neighbors (k) use filtering anchors. Set NA turn filtering. Default `200`. k.score many neighbors (k) use scoring anchors. Default `30`. k.weight Number neighbors consider weighting anchors. Default `100`. projection_method character string specifying projection method use. Options "model" "knn". "model" selected, function try use pre-trained UMAP model reference object projection. "knn" selected, function directly find nearest neighbors using distance metric. nn_method character string specifying nearest neighbor search method use. Options "raw", "annoy", "rann", "cpp". "raw" selected, function use brute-force method find nearest neighbors. "annoy" selected, function use Annoy library approximate nearest neighbor search. "rann" selected, function use RANN library approximate nearest neighbor search. "cpp" selected, function use compiled exact top-k search. provided, function use "cpp" Euclidean cosine distance, otherwise choose search method based size query reference datasets. k number nearest neighbors find cell query object. distance_metric distance metric use calculating pairwise distances cells. Options include: "pearson", "spearman", "cosine", "correlation", "jaccard", "ejaccard", "dice", "edice", "hamman", "simple matching", "faith". Additional distance metrics can also used, "euclidean", "manhattan", "hamming", etc. vote_fun character string specifying function used aggregating nearest neighbors reference object. Options "mean", "median", "sum", "min", "max", "sd", "var", etc. provided, default "mean".

what: Annotate single cells using SingleR — RunSingleR
title: Annotate single cells using SingleR — RunSingleR
text: Annotate single cells using SingleR

title: Annotate single cells using SingleR — RunSingleR
code: RunSingleR(   srt_query,   srt_ref,   query_group = NULL,   ref_group = NULL,   query_assay = "RNA",   ref_assay = "RNA",   genes = "de",   de.method = "wilcox",   sd.thresh = 1,   de.n = NULL,   aggr.ref = FALSE,   aggr.args = list(),   quantile = 0.8,   fine.tune = TRUE,   tune.thresh = 0.05,   prune = TRUE,   cores = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Annotate single cells using SingleR — RunSingleR
text: srt_query object class Seurat annotated cell types. srt_ref object class Seurat storing reference cells. query_group character vector specifying column name srt_query metadata represents cell grouping. ref_group character vector specifying column name srt_ref metadata represents cell grouping. query_assay character vector specifying assay used query data. Default default assay srt_query object. ref_assay character vector specifying assay used reference data. Default default assay srt_ref object. genes string containing "de", indicating markers calculated ref. back compatibility, string values allowed ignored deprecation warning. Alternatively, ref list, genes can either: list lists character vectors containing DE genes pairs labels. list character vectors containing marker genes label. ref list, genes can list length equal ref. element list one two choices described non-list ref, containing markers labels corresponding entry ref. de.method String specifying DE genes detected pairs labels. Defaults "classic", sorts genes log-fold changes takes top de.n. options "wilcox" "t", see Details. Ignored genes list markers/DE genes. sd.thresh Deprecated ignored. de.n integer scalar specifying number DE genes use genes="de". de.method="classic", defaults 500 * (2/3) ^ log2(N) N number unique labels. Otherwise, defaults 10. Ignored genes list markers/DE genes. aggr.ref, aggr.args Arguments controlling aggregation references prior annotation, see trainSingleR. quantile "quantile" parameter SingleR::SingleR function. fine.tune "fine.tune" parameter SingleR::SingleR function. tune.thresh "tune.thresh" parameter SingleR::SingleR function. prune "prune" parameter SingleR::SingleR function. cores number cores use parallelization foreach::foreach. Default 1. verbose Whether print message. Default TRUE.

title: Annotate single cells using SingleR — RunSingleR
text: annotate Seurat object. annotation results stored singler_annotation column meta data, corresponding scores stored singler_score column.

title: RunSlingshot — RunSlingshot
text: srt Seurat object. group.Name one meta.data columns group (color) cells . reduction dimensionality reduction use. specified, use reduction returned DefaultReduction. dims dimensions use Slingshot algorithm. Default NULL, uses first two dimensions. start starting group Slingshot algorithm. Default NULL. end ending group Slingshot algorithm. Default NULL. prefix prefix add column names resulting pseudotime variable. Default NULL. reverse Logical value indicating whether reverse pseudotime variable. Default FALSE. align_start Logical value indicating whether align starting pseudotime values maximum pseudotime. Default FALSE. show_plot Logical value indicating whether show dimensionality plot. Default TRUE. lineage_palette color palette use lineages plot. Default "Dark2". seed Random seed reproducibility. Default 11. ... Additional arguments passed slingshot::slingshot function.
